faqs.question: What is your review of the placements at Swarrnim University?
faqs.answer:
The training and placement cell facilitates students by providing industrial visits, projects, soft-skills training, industry meets, etc. Some of the major steps involved in the Swarrnim Startup and Innovation University placement process are mentioned below:
Pre-Placement Talk
Aptitude and Technical Test-Online/ Written Test
Group Discussion
Personal Interviews-HR Interview/ Technical Interview
Selection of Candidates
Acceptance of the offer and Communication with all the Candidates
Joining Procedure

faqs.answer: A:    Swarrnim Startup and Innovation University fees for the BSc course might range from INR 1 Lacs to INR 3 Lacs per the specialisations candidates wants to pursue. The fees might include multiple components other than the tuition fees. Students are required to pay the BSc fees once the admission lists are out. faqs.question: What is the fee structure for B.Sc in Swarnim University?

faqs.answer: A:    Approximately 1.3 Lacs is the yearly fee for the standard MBA programme. There would be a yearly tuition fee of around 1.5 Lacs for various specialisations, such as the MBA in Healthcare Management and the MBA in Family Business Management. Every year, this charge will change. If a student chooses to live on campus, there will be fees for the mess and hostel.Scholarships based on merit are provided by SSIU to exceptional applicants accepted into the MBA programme. Your academic standing and admission exam results determine how much of the scholarship you receive. For students who can prove they are financially struggling, SSIU also provides need-based scholarships.Financial statements and evidence of income are among the paperwork required when applying for a need-based scholarship.

faqs.answer: A:    The seat intake for BSc in Nursing at Swarrnim Startup and Innovation University is around 60 seats. The university offers a limited number of seats for is Nursing course. Therefore candidates must make sure to apply for the programme as soon the application portal is open. Candidates must make sure to have a valid qualifiction for BSc in Nursing before applying for the course.
faqs.question: What is the seat intake for B.Sc in Nursing at SSIU?

faqs.answer: A:    SSIU admits students to its MBA programme based on results from a range of entrance exams. These entrance exams include Common Admission Test (CAT), Management Aptitude Test (MAT), Centralized Management Admission Test (CMAT) Symbiosis National Aptitude test are all written tests. There is also a university-run admission test called SSIU AdmissionsTest: SSApp!QBheader imageWe should also keep in mind that the relative weight of different entrance exams differs from year to year and for each program. In short, it's always best to go directly to the official SSIU website or phone admissions for up-to-date information. Besides entrance exam scores, SSIU also requires applicants to hold a graduation degree with at least 50 % aggregate marks.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Information Technology - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: It provides good placements and good vibes for studies.

review_content.Placements: It does excellent work and places students. There is a very good environment in college areas. 92% of students are eligible for placements in B.Sc. IT. Many students get good packages in their courses. Students have a great platform for placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has its own personal Wi-Fi and labs for students. Classrooms are very big and attractive for students who come from other cities and states. It has a nice school structure. The hostel, mess, and medical facilities are good. The campus has good vibes for outer students. The infrastructure of the college is very good. It has good vibes.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Reasonable academics, but lacks industry focus, poor infrastructure, and limited placements.

review_content.Placements: As a B.Pharma student, only 10% of us got placed, with packages ranging from Rs 2 LPA - Rs 6 LPA. Local companies dominate placements and internships, with only 5% getting internship opportunities. The college needs better industry exposure and placement support.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is poor, with overcrowded hostels housing 5 students per room and visible wall cracks. Labs are average, though medical labs are slightly better. The library is decent. Sports activities are inactive, and medical assistance is slow to respond.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: An average college for those who want just a degree.

review_content.Placements: 30-40% of students were placed in my course. They market 40 LPA as the highest package, but talking to some of my seniors, there are no such packages offered. Local companies recruit; they market themselves like big companies coming for recruitment, but I haven't witnessed that.
review_content.Infrastructure: The situation is very poor: no proper Wi-Fi and no proper system; they still use Windows 7, with broken mice and keyboards. The library is much better, having been renovated this year. The hostel quality was very poor, but it has improved. The canteen, medical facility, and sports and games are average.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA Hons) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Affordable but lacks practical learning and industry exposure: average infrastructure and events.

review_content.Placements: Around 40% of students are placed. The highest package was 5 LPA, the lowest was 1.8 LPA, with an average around 2.5 LPA. A few internships are offered in small firms, with roles mostly in sales, support, or trainee positions. The top recruiters are limited; overall, the placement scenario is average but consistent.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus has decent Wi-Fi, average labs, and basic classrooms. The library is small but functional. Hostel rooms need maintenance, mess food is repetitive, and the sports facilities are limited. Medical help is available, but response time is slow. The hostel rooms are very small and have to be shared with 5 people, which is not good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Good placements and campus life, but the curriculum needs an update.

review_content.Placements: About 85% of students from my batch get placed, with the highest package at 18 LPA, the lowest at 3.5 LPA, and an average of 6.5 LPA. Top recruiters are TCS, Infosys, Accenture, and Capgemini. Around 70% get internships in firms like Wipro and Deloitte.
review_content.Infrastructure: The department offers modern labs, fast Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, and a well-stocked library. Hostels are clean and decent, the mess food is average, and there are good medical facilities. The campus also has sports grounds for cricket, badminton, and more.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA Hons.) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: It has a good course curriculum and placements. It lacks practical exposure.

review_content.Placements: Almost 89% of students get placed in our course. The average salary package is offered in our course. Top recruiting companies visit the college to hire students from our course. About 60% of students from our course got internships. The top 5 roles are offered in the Bachelor of Computer Application course.
review_content.Infrastructure: Good facilities and infrastructure are available in the college. It has fast Wi-Fi, powerful labs, the best classrooms, the best library, and the best hostel. The food quality is average. Medical facilities, sports, and games are available specially for students. The environment of my college is very good.

faqs.answer: Bachelor's in Technology is a popular course in India. Students from all parts of the country mostly prefers the course for further studies after theis Class 12 education in the best engineering college. Among the best colleges/universities in India, Swarrnim University is a reputed and trusted university that is known to offer various streams in engineering among which one can select. Some of the popular streams in engineering are Electrical Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, and many more. Students are free to select any according to their choice and preference.Moreover, the university has been ranked one of the top universities in India in the Band Promising category category in the Atal Ranking of Institutions on Innovation Achievements 2021, an initiative of the Ministry of Education, Government of India. The university has also been ranked in Top 50 institutions in India on Innovation Achievement and top 4 private universities selected from Gujrat 2020. Additionally, the institute has also been rated 3.5/4 stars in Institutions Innovation Council 3.0 (2020-2021) by the Ministry of Education, Government of India. The university has state-of-the -art infrastructure with all the modern facilities and amenities for smooth conduction of the course.
faqs.question: Q: Is B.Sc from Swarrnim University worth pursuing?

faqs.answer: The last year 2022 cutoff ranks for BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery at Swarrnim Startup and Innovation University other than General category are - 149783 for OBC, 149783 for SC, 149783 for ST, 149783 for EWS, 149783 for PWD. While the admissions are based on the scores/rank obtained in NEET exam, the last cut offs also change a lot depending on All India quota or Home State.
faqs.question: Q: What is the cutoff for BAMS at Swarrnim Startup and Innovation University for other than general categories?

faqs.answer: The opening and closing rank depends on the category and quota of candidates. For general category under All India, opening rank was 149783 and closing rank was 149783. The cutoffs are different when it comes to other categories or female candidates and even domicile of home state. Admission to BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery in Swarrnim Startup and Innovation University is based on the scores obtained in the entrance exam NEET. Applicants are advised to confirm what category are they applying while checking for cut offs.

admission_overview.college_name: SSIU Admission 2026: Dates, Courses, Eligibility, Application Form

admission_process.title: SSIU Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: SSIU provides Diploma, UG, PG and PhD courses in disciplines such as Engineering, Architecture, Design, Science, Management and Paramedical streams. These include courses such as BTech, BCA, BCom, MCA, MCom, MBA, BBA, BSc and BArch.

At SSIU, admission is done basis entrance exams. BTech admission is done basis JEE Main scores. For BArch, the University considers NATA scores. PG course admissions are granted upon students performance in centralized counselling conducted by the University. LLB admission process is done on merit basis.
Popular Courses
Eligibility Criteria
Selection Criteria
Graduation/ Master's with a minimum aggregate of 50%
The application process is online. Check the eligibility as mentioned above and apply accordingly.
Specialized Entrance Tests and Criteria

UG Admissions to courses such as BDes (Graphics & Animation Design), BA (Event Management), BSc Animation & VFX, Gaming, and Catering & Hotel Management are through entrance test conducted by SSIU. BArch admissions is through valid NATA exam score. Valid NEET UG score is mandatory for BAMS and BHMS programmes. BPT admissions are done basis GUJCET scores. Admission to other UG programs is done on merit basis.
PG Courses admission for courses such as MPlan is based on GUJCET scores. Admission to other PG programs is done on merit basis.
For Additional Courses such as diploma, PG diploma and certificate programs, admission is based on merit.
BTech Admission 2026
Download SSIU Brochure
lists: UG Admissions to courses such as BDes (Graphics & Animation Design), BA (Event Management), BSc Animation & VFX, Gaming, and Catering & Hotel Management are through entrance test conducted by SSIU. BArch admissions is through valid NATA exam score. Valid NEET UG score is mandatory for BAMS and BHMS programmes. BPT admissions are done basis GUJCET scores. Admission to other UG programs is done on merit basis.
PG Courses admission for courses such as MPlan is based on GUJCET scores. Admission to other PG programs is done on merit basis.
For Additional Courses such as diploma, PG diploma and certificate programs, admission is based on merit.
Admission to BTech program is done basis merit that is scores obtained in HSC.
Class 12 pass from a recognized board with Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics as main subjects is the eligibility.

placement_report.college_name: SSIU Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: SSIU Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: The Swarrnim Startup and Innovation University placements for 2024 recorded a highest domestic package of INR 84 LPA . The highest international package offered stood at INR 48 LPA . More than 400 companies took part in the placements and offered over 2600 jobs .

Earlier, the University witnessed the participation of 400 companies during 2023 placements. The average package offered during Swarrnim Startup and Innovation University placements 2023 was INR 5.18 LPA . Further, the highest domestic package and highest international package stood at INR 30 LPA and INR 48 LPA , respectively.

The Training and Placement cell at SSIU started Campus to Corporate Program (CTCP) that offers the students' overall development. The students are placed in MNC's and various industries like Service Based, Product Based, Pharmaceutical, IT, FMCG, banking, insurance, hospitality, agriculture, etc.

faqs.question: What are the fees structures for MBA programmes at SSIU?
faqs.answer: Approximately 1.3 Lacs is the yearly fee for the standard MBA programme. There would be a yearly tuition fee of around 1.5 Lacs for various specialisations, such as the MBA in Healthcare Management and the MBA in Family Business Management. Every year, this charge will change. If a student chooses to live on campus, there will be fees for the mess and hostel. Scholarships based on merit are provided by SSIU to exceptional applicants accepted into the MBA programme. Your academic standing and admission exam results determine how much of the scholarship you receive. For students who can prove they are financially struggling, SSIU also provides need-based scholarships.Financial statements and evidence of income are among the paperwork required when applying for a need-based scholarship.

faqs.question: What is the fee structure for B.Sc in Swarnim University?
faqs.answer: Swarrnim Startup and Innovation University fees for the BSc course might range from INR 1 Lacs to INR 3 Lacs per the specialisations candidates wants to pursue. The fees might include multiple components other than the tuition fees. Students are required to pay the BSc fees once the admission lists are out. The fee information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

The SSIU cutoff 2024 was concluded for JEE Main with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as the opening and closing ranks for admission to the BE/BTech, courses. During the SSIU BE/BTech cutoff 2024, the last-round closing ranks ranged between 12933 and 50370 for the General HS category students. Of all the BE/BTech specialisations, the one that faced fierce competition was B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering.

The JEE Main cutoff 2024 was released for the General, OBC, ST, SC, EWS, and PWD categories in the HS quota. Considering the last round 2024 cutoff, B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering was the most sought-after BE/BTech specialization with a closing rank of 12933 for the general HS quota.

hostel_campus.college_name: SSIU Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: It provides good placements and good vibes for studies.
reviews.review_text: The college has its own personal Wi-Fi and labs for students. Classrooms are very big and attractive for students who come from other cities and states. It has a nice school structure. The hostel, mess, and medical facilities are good. The campus has good vibes for outer students. The infrastructure of the college is very good. It has good vibes.

reviews.review_heading: Reasonable academics, but lacks industry focus, poor infrastructure, and limited placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is poor, with overcrowded hostels housing 5 students per room and visible wall cracks. Labs are average, though medical labs are slightly better. The library is decent. Sports activities are inactive, and medical assistance is slow to respond.

reviews.review_heading: An average college for those who want just a degree.
reviews.review_text: The situation is very poor: no proper Wi-Fi and no proper system; they still use Windows 7, with broken mice and keyboards. The library is much better, having been renovated this year. The hostel quality was very poor, but it has improved. The canteen, medical facility, and sports and games are average.

reviews.review_heading: Affordable but lacks practical learning and industry exposure: average infrastructure and events.
reviews.review_text: The campus has decent Wi-Fi, average labs, and basic classrooms. The library is small but functional. Hostel rooms need maintenance, mess food is repetitive, and the sports facilities are limited. Medical help is available, but response time is slow. The hostel rooms are very small and have to be shared with 5 people, which is not good.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements and campus life, but the curriculum needs an update.
reviews.review_text: The department offers modern labs, fast Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, and a well-stocked library. Hostels are clean and decent, the mess food is average, and there are good medical facilities. The campus also has sports grounds for cricket, badminton, and more.

reviews.review_heading: It has a good course curriculum and placements. It lacks practical exposure.
reviews.review_text: Good facilities and infrastructure are available in the college. It has fast Wi-Fi, powerful labs, the best classrooms, the best library, and the best hostel. The food quality is average. Medical facilities, sports, and games are available specially for students. The environment of my college is very good.

reviews.review_heading: Only for certification.
reviews.review_text: There's no Wi-Fi, but yes, the infrastructure is good. It is equipped with a separate library for engineering & medical sides. There's a big cricket ground, football ground, tennis court, badminton court, and a proper full-fledged medical ward/hospital. For engineers, there are 2 different computer labs: Windows lab & Apple lab. A separate seminar room is also available. It's equipped with almost everything a student wishes for. And there's a good canteen too.

reviews.review_heading: College with Apple labs and incubation center for innovative ideas.
reviews.review_text: We have a Wi-Fi campus, and it's only available in labs and libraries. My college has Apple labs and computer labs. We also have an incubation center where we can give our inventions or innovative ideas. We have an incubation cell for innovative ideas, and we also get capital if our idea is good. The food is much better. We have free Wi-Fi available in the hostel. There is a Bed and a separate river for everyone.

reviews.review_heading: After all, if you are a person who is easy.
reviews.review_text: Every facility seems pretty decent and I have no complaints regarding it. Everything works perfectly fine for me in the uni premises. Hostel rooms have a total capacity of 5 people per room allotment and yes it is very good , no problem at my end.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Arihant School of Pharmacy and Bio-research Institute.
reviews.review_text: In our college, all classrooms had air-conditioning. All facilities were available in labs. Both the gas line and water supply were properly installed. In our college library, all types of books were available for knowledge gain. There were various types of references available. The food served in the canteen was good and healthy.

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent college.
reviews.review_text: The quality of food was so good in the canteen. There was a good environment for education.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best colleges.
reviews.review_text: Our college has well-equipped labs, 24X7 Wi-Fi, an incubation center, and a library with more than 5000 books. There are air-conditioned and non-air-conditioned hostels with 4 and 5 sharing rooms. Our college has playgrounds for cricket, football, and a swimming pool. Apple lab is available. It has a hygienic mess, pure drinking water facilities in the hostel and college, and a cafeteria with reasonable food items.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with its education system.
reviews.review_text: Our campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Classrooms are good but air-conditioners are not available. We also have a library for specific B.E and B.Tech students. There is a medical campus, and doctors are also available. There is a hospital that provides free medicines and services. Sports activities are also conducted in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is best for the B. Pharmacy study.
reviews.review_text: In our college, the infrastructure is very good. It provides a clean class, laboratories, and libraries are also very useful and all books and references are available. In our college canteens is very good, and the food quality is excellent. The medical facilities are available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied with faculty members and college authorities.
reviews.review_text: All labs have medium-level facilities. There is no Wi-Fi facility. The classrooms are good and huge with some good facilities. The library is awesome. I have no idea about hostel facilities. The quality of food served is the best in the canteen area. Medical facilities are good 24 hours. The sports area is separate, and all types of games are available.

college_info.college_name: SSIU Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Approximately 1.3 Lacs is the yearly fee for the standard MBA programme. There would be a yearly tuition fee of around 1.5 Lacs for various specialisations, such as the MBA in Healthcare Management and the MBA in Family Business Management. Every year, this charge will change. If a student chooses to live on campus, there will be fees for the mess and hostel.

Scholarships based on merit are provided by SSIU to exceptional applicants accepted into the MBA programme. Your academic standing and admission exam results determine how much of the scholarship you receive. For students who can prove they are financially struggling, SSIU also provides need-based scholarships.Financial statements and evidence of income are among the paperwork required when applying for a need-based scholarship.

The University offers financial assistance to economically weak students. SSIU has a “Swarrnim Eay Fee” system, where the University provides education loan at 0% interest rate. The loan will be provided without any processing charge and 100% free insurance cover funding.

Swarrnim Startup and Innovation University fees for the BSc course might range from INR 1 Lacs to INR 3 Lacs per the specialisations candidates wants to pursue. The fees might include multiple components other than the tuition fees. Students are required to pay the BSc fees once the admission lists are out. The fee information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: The National Institute of Engineering, North Campus is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from streams such as Engineering and IT & Software. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.E. / B.Tech. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include MCA. The fee structure for The National Institute of Engineering, North Campus programmes is around INR 1,92,800 to 5,15,640.

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, The National Institute of Engineering, North Campus, provides a relaxation in the eligibility criteria for candidates belonging to the reserved category. This relaxation is provided to support students belonging to the underprivileged section of society.As per the institute's official website, general category students seeking admission to the MCA must have completed a valid UG degree with a minimum of 50% marks. While for students belonging to the SC/ST category, the institute offers a 5% relaxation in the eligibility criteria. Thus, candidates who belong to the aforementioned categories are eligible if they have secured a minimum of 45% marks in aggregate in a bachelor's degree.

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, NIE North Campus Mysore offers 60 seats for admission to the MCA programme via management quota. After the screening of the application form is complete, the institute assigns a counsellor to eligible students. These counsellors further get in touch with the students/parents and guide them through the rest of the admission process. Once the Principal approves the admission, students must make the payment of fees to secure their seat.

faqs.answer: A:    NIE North Campus Mysore offers a total of 120 seats for the MCA programme. answer.text: Graduates with a BTech degree in CSE are in high demand across a plethora of work fields, as everything is ruled by computer technology these days and every industry needs strong software applications, network security, and database management systems for effective working. A few top industries recruiting BTech in CSE graduates are given here:IT & SoftwareProduct DevelopmentE-Commerce and Digital CommerceCloud Computing & AIData Science & AnalyticsBanking and FinTechAutomotiveHealthcareUseful Link: BTech CSE Career Scope

faqs.question: Which industries hire students with a BTech CSE qualification?

answer.text: Yes, there are many employment opportunities offered by the government sector for MCA students. Thus, those who have completed their MCA degrees from NIE can seek out various job opportunities in the public sector.Some of the reputed India PSUs to work for are NTPC, BHEL, GAIL, EIL, etc. Those who are willing to work in such PSUs have to appear for various government exams, such as UPSC (Union Public Service Commission) Exams, Staff Selection Commission (SSC), etc. Students recruited by the public sector of India can expect to start with a salary ranging from INR 5 LPA to INR 6 LPA.

faqs.question: Are there any government job opportunities that I can seek after completing MCA from NIE North Campus Mysore?

answer.text: Yes, students enrolled in the NIE North Campus Mysore MCA programme are required to complete an internship. The period of internship must be a minimum of four weeks. Moreover, this internship is to be carried out in the vacation period provided between the end of the second semester and the beginning of the third semester. Post-completion of the internship, students must submit a detailed report on internship work highlighting their key learnings.

faqs.question: Are students enrolled in the NIE North Campus Mysore MCA programme required do an internship?

answer.text: The BTech CSE syllabus is incomplete without regular lab classes and internship programs because of the importance of programming, software development, and AI and ML knowledge required in the CSE field, which cannot be taught only through theory classes.Premier institutes often collaborate with leading industrial partners to provide their students with the best internship exposure and training opportunities, which may act as an entry point to excellent earning opportunities later. review_summary.college_name: The National Institute of Engineering, North Campus Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure, faculty and placements.

content.Placements: Initially, NIE North Campus had a very good reputation and excellent placements, and it was the top engineering college in Mysore, but over the past few years, its reputation has decreased slightly. The faculty says that it will increase from now on. Currently, NIE is in the top 3 engineering colleges in Mysore, with JSS MYSORE being the top 1.
content.Infrastructure: The food quality and infrastructure are pretty good. They have libraries that have all the relevant books, and we can just borrow them from the library for a week and then renew them weekly, so we don't have to purchase additional new books. They also have an indoor sports room and a ground where sports activities and events are conducted.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Information Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It has a modern campus, great placement support, and value for money for software branches.

content.Placements: I am from the Information Science and Engineering from the 2022-2025 batch. Around 85-90 percent of students got placed in campus placements last year. The highest package offered is 46 LPA and the average package ranges from 8-9 LPA. Top recruiting companies include Deloitte Infosys and Oracle. Students get internships from A. P Moller Fedility Investment etc.
content.Infrastructure: The North campus has modern labs, Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, and hostels with decent food and facilities. Sports, library, and canteen are shared with the main campus. Hygiene and cleanliness are well-maintained. Mess food is hygienic, but becomes repetitive over time. Canteen options are limited but affordable. Sports facilities like cricket, basketball, and the gym are available on the main campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: NIE (The National Institute of Engineering North Campus) not NIT, guys!

content.Placements: The highest: 28 LPA, Avg: 12 LPA, the lowest: 5 LPA. This is for the 2025 batch. Still, the placement is on the way, but overall placement is above average, not so good, but trying to improve. Let’s see what happens to our batch. Top recruiters are Hello Doc, Fidelity, Visa, Wipro.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is okay, not that much fancy. Wi-Fi is there, but it’s of no use, barely works. Classrooms are well-maintained with smartboards, and yes, the hostels are pretty good. But the only con I find is the location—it’s out of the city, so it feels like you went for a trip to a safari or in a forest.

faqs.answer: The application process for NIE North Campus Mysore is conducted online for all programmes, including MCA. Check out the below steps to know the complete application process:1.Visit the online admission portal of the institute.2.Click on the 'Apply Now' banner.3.Generate a new candidature account by filling out your details in the admission form.4.Choose the preferred institute and upload the required documents.5.Pay the registration fee and submit the form.

faqs.question: What is the fees structure for MCA programme at NIE North Campus Mysore?
faqs.answer: The NIE North Campus Mysore MCA fee structure includes two major components, tuition fees and hostel fees. The tuition fees is to be paid by all students enrolled in the MCA programme. However, the hostel fees is to be paid only by the students who opt for the hostel facilities. Check out the below table to know the entire fee breakdown for the MCA programme:Fee componentsAmountTuition FeesINR 1.8 lakhHostel FeesINR 1.76 lakhTotal FeeINR 3.53 lakhNote:The above-mentioned fee is as per the offici

faqs.question: Can I get a NIE North Campus Mysore MCA seat via management quota?
faqs.answer: Yes, NIE North Campus Mysore offers 60 seats for admission to the MCA programme via management quota. To get a management seat, students are first required to fill out the application form. After the screening of the application form is complete, the institute assigns a counsellor to eligible students. These counsellors further get in touch with the students/parents and guide them through the rest of the admission process. Once the Principal approves the admission, students must make the payment

faqs.question: How to get a seat in NIE North Campus Mysore for MCA?
faqs.answer: The allocation of MCA seats offered at the north campus of NIE Mysore is done based on marks obtained in the Karnataka PGCET. Apart from this, students must also satisfy the minimum eligibility requirements as stated by the institute.Students seeking admission to the programme must apply for the course by visiting the official website of the institute. After submitting the application, students must stay updated with the merit list. If shortlisted, they are required to pay the admission fee to secure their seats.

faqs.question: How can I get admission in NIE North Campus Mysore for MCA?
faqs.answer: TheNIE North Campus Mysore MCA admission processbegins with the application stage. In this stage, interested students are required to submit an application form on the institute's online application portal. The students are required to submit basic details such as name, phone number, address, education qualification, etc.Once the application stage is completed, the university constitutes a rank list based on students' scores in the Karnataka PGCET exam. Based on this list, students are shortlisted. Such students must report to the institute and complete the fee payment process.

faqs.question: Is there any relaxation to SC/ST candidates in eligibility criteria for MCA at NIE North Campus Mysore?
faqs.answer: Yes, The National Institute of Engineering, North Campus, provides a relaxation in the eligibility criteria for candidates belonging to the reserved category. This relaxation is provided to support students belonging to the underprivileged section of society.As per the institute's official website, general category students seeking admission to the MCA must have completed a valid UG degree with a minimum of 50% marks. While for students belonging to theSC/ST category, the institute offers a5% relaxationin the eligibility criteria. Thus, candidates who belong to the aforementioned categories are eligible if they have secured a minimum of45% marks in aggregate in a bachelor's degree.

faqs.question: How many seats are there in NIE North Campus Mysore for MCA?
faqs.answer: NIE North Campus Mysore offers a total of120 seatsfor the MCA programme. As per the official website, the institute also offers 60 seats apart from the 120 seats for admission via management quota. Students must note that this information has been sourced from the official website of the institute. However, it is subject to change at the discretion of concerned authorities.

hostel_campus.college_name: The National Institute of Engineering

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, faculty and placements.
reviews.review_text: The food quality and infrastructure are pretty good. They have libraries that have all the relevant books, and we can just borrow them from the library for a week and then renew them weekly, so we don't have to purchase additional new books. They also have an indoor sports room and a ground where sports activities and events are conducted.

reviews.review_heading: It has a modern campus, great placement support, and value for money for software branches.
reviews.review_text: The North campus has modern labs, Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, and hostels with decent food and facilities. Sports, library, and canteen are shared with the main campus. Hygiene and cleanliness are well-maintained. Mess food is hygienic, but becomes repetitive over time. Canteen options are limited but affordable. Sports facilities like cricket, basketball, and the gym are available on the main campus.

reviews.review_heading: National Institute of Engineering, North Campus., Mysore, pros and cons.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are spacious, and the equipment like projectors and cameras are of good quality. Wi-Fi works very well. The library is quiet almost every time so a good place to study. I live in the hostel on the South campus so I don't have much idea about the North campus but some of my friends live on the North campus and they say, the food is great, along with sports but traveling is always an issue.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is a good college for learning new things.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available for our course are very good. The library is also very sophisticated. Labs are very clean and good for conducting practicals. Wi-Fi is available on the campus. The quality of the food available in the mess is good.

reviews.review_heading: NIE (The National Institute of Engineering North Campus) not NIT, guys!
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is okay, not that much fancy. Wi-Fi is there, but it’s of no use, barely works. Classrooms are well-maintained with smartboards, and yes, the hostels are pretty good. But the only con I find is the location—it’s out of the city, so it feels like you went for a trip to a safari or in a forest.

reviews.review_heading: Review about The National Institute of Engineering, Mysore (North Campus).
reviews.review_text: There are a lot of canteens to eat from. The infrastructure is quite decent. Wi-Fi facility is available to all students. There are plenty of labs and classrooms. The library has a vast amount of books in it. Hostel facilities are good, with Wi-Fi facility around 50 Mbps, and a gym inside the hostel campus. Cricket, football, and badminton can be played in the hostel. The food is decent, not too good.

reviews.review_heading: Review on The National institute of Engineering, North campus.
reviews.review_text: The college has a Wi-Fi connection, but it is not available in all parts of the college. I am a day scholar, so I don't know much about the hostel. The college has a decent hostel building and a well-articulated college building. Although students complain about the food, it's mainly because they are from different parts of the state and country. The hostel food is mainly Mysore cuisine, which is quite tasty.

reviews.review_heading: Best college to join and best weather, with a good environment. All facilities available are good.
reviews.review_text: Luxury hostel, with 3 sharing. Wi-Fi available. Food is only (veg) tasty. Gym is available, the cheapest compared to Bangalore hostel. Puri, dosa, sweet chip, palov, idli, rava idli. Tasty food and amazing food. Laptops are so useful to everyone for studying. Good notes are given.

reviews.review_heading: College is good but infrastructure is not good and facilities are not available.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are not that great, but they are adequate. The campus is 25 acres, and it is a big and green campus. It is a Wi-Fi campus, and the classrooms are big, although they do not have air conditioning. The library is good, and it has its own building with a lot of space for reading. The hostel is good, and the mess is average. The canteen is not that great, but it is also adequate.

reviews.review_heading: The NIE : A Brief review .
reviews.review_text: All the facilities are good, and the infrastructure is also huge. There are smart classrooms in every building, and the library is also good. The food quality in the hostel is also very good, but the Wi-Fi facility is a bit poor. Other than that, everything is good. The hostel also conducts various tournaments for students, which are very engaging and joyful.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with good placements. Not much fests kind of college. Good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. The lectures here are very good and helpful. But there is no proper Wi-Fi supply. But you have a very good library in the college, and when it comes to hostels, we have two hostels: one is on the North campus and the other on the South campus. The North campus hostel is pretty good when compared to the South campus.

reviews.review_heading: If you have no other options to consider, then a college with decent placement.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure was okay, the labs are good, and they have good Wi-Fi. The hostel condition is not at all good; you should consider joining nearby PGs. There are no sports facilities, only a few sports are there, but you can consider doing good in them for sure.

reviews.review_heading: Everything you need to know about The National Institute of Engineering Mysuru.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is pretty average, considering there is not much outside the North Campus where our classes are held. In contrast, the South Campus is in the city, making things more accessible. The hostel mess and the hostel infrastructure are again average for what you can expect from a hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied with the college and its practices.
reviews.review_text: The wifi is pretty bad and none of the classes are equipped with smart boards or anything, just a projector where teachers present the most basic presentations. The library is pretty fine and you get additional online resources too. There is no place for games, just a basketball hoop, not even a basketball court and even football is played on that uneven field. The canteen is the worst, not even proper food; hostels are the worst, especially the girl's one, just to make sure you are not even all...

reviews.review_heading: The only thing is a smaller number of fests; other than that, it is very good for the placements.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure in our college is good and we have a library where we get all the books we require. Labs are also very good and every classroom is fitted with projectors. Hostel food is also nice and there are sports and medical facilities in case of emergency.

paragraphs: The average BTech CSE salary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.

The salary depends on factors like the years of experience you hold, your academic qualification, skill set, etc. Once you enter the industry and get some years of experience in hand, you will get a higher salary package. But, in the starting of your career journey, you can expect between INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA.

The highest package in the last placement cycle was around 8 LPA-10 LPA, the lowest around 3 LPA-3.5 LPA, and the average generally stays in the 4.5 LPA-6 LPA range.

hostel_campus.college_name: Dhaanish Ahmed College of Engineering Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Excellent placements with good infrastructure strong academics.
reviews.review_text: The department is equipped with Wi-Fi enabled smart classrooms, well-maintained computer and electronics laboratories, and a resource-rich central library with digital access. The hostel provides clean rooms, good food in the mess and canteen, basic medical care, and excellent sports and games facilities for overall student development.

reviews.review_heading: College with my upskill learn.
reviews.review_text: Our campus has Wi-Fi connectivity, labs are also well-equipped, and classrooms are clean. In our library, all sorts of domain books are available. In the hostel, good food is provided, both vegetarian and non-vegetarian. In the sports club, all the games we participated in were taught by a trainer.

reviews.review_heading: My college DACE life with Academics.
reviews.review_text: All the hostel rooms are well kept and electronic gadgets are working very well, the hostels are good and healthy, and they provide extra-curricular activities like sports, gym, yoga, and some other activities, and during exam time there are also special classes for studying for the semester.

reviews.review_heading: My college, my life with friends.
reviews.review_text: Our campus is fully Wi-Fi enabled, and labs are also well equipped. Classrooms are neat and clean. In our library, all books are available as we expect. In the hostel, free Wi-Fi and good food are provided, both veg and non-veg. In the sports club, we participated in all games, and there are well-trained trainers.

reviews.review_heading: Decent academics, average facilities, and good enough for students who take initiative.
reviews.review_text: Our Robotics & Automation Engineering department has the essential infrastructure to support core learning. The campus is fully Wi-Fi enabled, though speed varies depending on loads. The classrooms are equipped with projectors and adequate seating, not ultra-modern but functional.

reviews.review_heading: DACE - My Academics story.
reviews.review_text: Dhaanish Ahmed College of Engineering has good infrastructure available for all students. Apart from academics, they have good labs and modern classrooms, and a good library. In Dhaanish Ahmed College of Engineering, the hostel is also excellent for students. Super and healthy food is provided in this college. And so many different sports are provided in this college.

reviews.review_heading: My college life with Dance Chennai.
reviews.review_text: Nice infrastructure, with a green and plastic-free campus. Our management provides hygienic food at the hostel, and we feel happy and healthy. We also use the free Wi-Fi, classrooms, and a centralized library. The labs are fully air-conditioned, well-cleaned, and good.

reviews.review_heading: Honest review about my college experience.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is okay in which the food is not too bad. It is good to eat and if the food is over they will prepare and give it. The canteen is run by someone in which the food is also good every evening. Sports happen like football, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Truth about Dhaanish Ahmed College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: Coming to the infrastructure, it's enough for students. They can explore more things from the high-tech D school which is the School of Intellectual Power House where students can gain and implement their skills and knowledge. Classrooms and infrastructure of this college are average.

reviews.review_heading: A college with good infrastructure and a well-planned academic structure.
reviews.review_text: Mostly, the classrooms are neatly maintained, and there are several facilities such as free Wi-Fi on the campus and hostel. But when it comes to a large number of users, it will be fair and suitable for general usage. Library and other avenues for technical development are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Dhaanish Ahmed College of Engineering review.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are well and good. The infrastructure is moderate, and Wi-Fi is available all over the campus. Labs, classrooms, and the library have nice infrastructure. Gyms are available. Hostel facilities are nice, but the food is not like home food. Hostel food can make you feel bad. Regarding medical, sports, and games, there is nothing like this.

reviews.review_heading: College and SIPH with my academics.
reviews.review_text: Green campus, plastic-free campus. Fully Wi-Fi campus. Classrooms and labs are cleaned well. In the hostel, there is also a Wi-Fi facility. The canteen is also hygienic. Sports and gym facilities are also available for us. Trainers give training for all those. We enjoyed a lot in our hostel.

reviews.review_heading: College life and my academics.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very futuristic. There is one building named the School of Intellectual Power House (SIPH). It has had the most beautiful and elegant infrastructure for the past two years. Many of the students like to work in the SIPH.

reviews.review_heading: Good college if you are preparing to become a better person in life and a good engineer in career.
reviews.review_text: Coming to the infrastructure, our college offers hostels for both boys and girls. The main thing is that hostels are inside the campus, so it ensures the students' safety and maintains discipline and culture. In the hostel, every block has separate water dispensers for drinking water and water heaters, which are very useful in the winter and all. Also, in each block, there will be 2 to 3 faculty members to regularly monitor us. The infrastructure of the college is made in the quality of internat...

reviews.review_heading: Dhaanish Ahmed College of Engineering review.
reviews.review_text: CSE department is best but staff teaching is bad. Hostel facilities are good but food is bad. In my college, there is Wi-Fi. Canteen food is good but mess food is bad. Many state football players are in my college and have achieved more prizes, and chess players are also there.

reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied. It is good value for money, peaceful, with fewer activities but good for research.

review_content.Placements: Our college has a 100% placement rate. There were 37 students in the fourth year, and all of those who wanted placement got placed. Some of them even got placed in their home state as they wanted just a salary package, which varies from 5 LPA to 8 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of NDRI is quite amazing. It is spread over 1300 acres and has a large number of livestock. It is full of greenery and quite peaceful. Even as you open the gate of your hostel room, you directly walk into grass. Classrooms are digital and labs are quite advanced.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Dairy Technology - Batch of 2016
reviews_list.review_title: NDRI is the number 1 agriculture university in India.

review_content.Placements: It is the best agriculture college in India. It ranked 1st in Agriculture University Rankings 2021. NDRI is the leading agriculture university that guides students in learning agriculture concepts, and placements are very good. Top recruiting companies are Nestle, Amul, Cadbury etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel facilities are excellent. The canteen is very impressive, surrounded by greenery, making it beautiful. The college also has medical facilities and a self-owned hospital, where students get free treatment. All you need here is your college identity card.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Dairy Technology - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: It is the best college in India for pursuing dairy technology, with ICAR ranking 1.

review_content.Placements: The placement scenario is excellent, which is responsibly managed by HOD. Almost 95% of the students got placed with decent salary packages in MNC ranges between 7-8 LPA. For cooperatives and in milk plants, the salary package offered ranges between 5-7 LPA. Top recruiters of our college are Nestle, Mother Dairy, Verka, Tetrapak, GSK, DuPont, Amul, etc. You can apply for prestigious DDO, i.e., Dairy Development Officer roles and other job internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: NDRI is the best agricultural university in India. Classrooms are well-equipped with air-conditioners, projectors, whiteboards, laptops and all other relevant materials. The campus is lush green and is expanded to about 1,450 acres. Free Wi-Fi is available, and the library is huge and well-furnished with proper sitting arrangements and relevant books. There are 4 cafeterias and mess for all 9 hostels, and all types of sports facilities are available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Dairy Technology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: A great place to learn from great scientists in a country with great opportunities for work.

content.Placements: Those students who want placements are placed definitely with an average package of 6 LPA - 7 LPA. The highest package is 9 LPA, and the lowest package is 6 LPA. Nestle, Tetra Pak, Amul, Sudha, Medha, Mother Dairy, etc., are recruiters till now. After completing this course, students are placed as executives in various companies.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available in hostel as well as classes. We have a great library infrastructure with a large volume of books. Classrooms have a projector with whiteboards. For sports, there is a nice arrangement. There is a separate health complex situated on campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Dairy Technology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It's a unique college with simple people.

content.Placements: Last year, placements percentage was approximately 95%, and it's a huge and good number of students that are placed. The highest package was nestled; it was giving approximately 12 LPA. And if you’ll talk about the average package, then it was 6 LPA—that's quite a good package. And if you’ll talk about top roles, then you will recruit for quality control, production section, and you’ll also recruit for the maintenance section.
content.Infrastructure: If you’ll talk about facilities, we have a total of 48 courses. Mainly the courses are dairy engineering, dairy technology, dairy microbiology, and some economics courses as well. There are also some extension courses that’ll help with your communication. And if you’ll talk about faculty, they are quite helpful in nature, and they’ll help you to do any project if you’re interested in that particular field. I’m talking about the B.Tech level because in other colleges, at the B.Tech level, it’s quite difficult to do any project-type things.

content.Placements: The placement scenario is excellent, which is responsibly managed by HOD. Almost 95% of the students got placed with decent salary packages in MNC ranges between 7-8 LPA. For cooperatives and in milk plants, the salary package offered ranges between 5-7 LPA. Top recruiters of our college are Nestle, Mother Dairy, Verka, Tetrapak, GSK, DuPont, Amul, etc. You can apply for prestigious DDO, i.e., Dairy Development Officer roles and other job internships.
content.Infrastructure: NDRI is the best agricultural university in India. Classrooms are well-equipped with air-conditioners, projectors, whiteboards, laptops and all other relevant materials. The campus is lush green and is expanded to about 1,450 acres. Free Wi-Fi is available, and the library is huge and well-furnished with proper sitting arrangements and relevant books. There are 4 cafeterias and mess for all 9 hostels, and all types of sports facilities are available.

hostel.description: NDRI provides separate hostels for Boys and Girls within the campus. The rooms are fully furnished. The hostel includes AC common room for sports and indoor games, reading rooms, hobby center, T.V. rooms, dining halls and kitchen with mess service. Students can access to Wi-Fi and library resources round the clock. A cafeteria is also available for refreshment near the hostel. B. Tech. students will get accommodate in Brahamputra Hostel, Post-graduate students will get accommodate in Sutlej Hostel, Krishna Hostel and Narmda Hostel and a separate hostel accommodation for girl students named Kaveri Girls Hostel. Married Scholar Hostel is also available for Ph.D. Scholars sponsored by other universities, institutions. Well-furnished international hostel with modern facilities is available for foreign students

library.description: The Institute has a National Library and divisional Libraries, National Library houses a rich collection of literature on dairying and related subjects, mainly comprises of 91,881 volumes which includes 52,010 books and 33,457 bound journals, bulletins, 4,646 theses, CD-ROMs, 268 microfiches and 1,500 CDs and reprints. The Library also provides the facility of Internet browsing, old documents, reference literature, photocopying services, printing and scanning facility, online full text download facility of research article from over 1200 journals of different publication houses. Subscribed to more than 100 periodicals

individual_reviews.title: Good college overall but it definitely needs a lot of improvement.

There is a lab for every single subject that is in the 4-year syllabus, and also the labs are very updated. One great fact is that the whole college is kept so clean. faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

hostel_campus.college_name: Guru Gobind Singh Foundation's Guru Gobind Singh College of Engineering and Research Centre Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is good, and students can take admission, and it's going to be good.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available for my course and department are Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library. Everything is good and in good condition. Each student can access all these facilities without any interruption. The college offers it very well.

reviews.review_heading: Amazing staff, beautiful campus, campus is always clean, and teaching is also very good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is amazing. There is Wi-Fi on campus. Labs are available for every subject. There is a library and a reading room separately. Canteen is very hygienic and provides very hygienic food and also tasty. We do have a sports room and sports activities.

reviews.review_heading: The college authorities paid a lot of attention to the students, and they had teaching experience.
reviews.review_text: The college campus was good, and it had everything, including a library, labs, canteen, ground, workshop, and much more. I never thought of bunking in my college, as it was such a great place. The college also offered many courses, such as Diploma, engineering, school, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Great college, good environment, infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Every floor has Wi-Fi, and every floor has labs as per their requirements and as per their course. The library is well-maintained and cleanliness is great. It has a great turf with great maintenance to provide students with great ground and amenities. The canteen food is also good.

reviews.review_heading: Good college overall but it definitely needs a lot of improvement.
reviews.review_text: Guru Gobind Singh College of Engineering and Research Centre offers a very great quality and type of infrastructure. Anything that students demand with unity is made available in a few months or sometimes even weeks. It can be basic lab materials or even a whole lab setup. There is a lab for every single subject that is in the 4-year syllabus, and also the labs are very updated. One great fact is that the whole college is kept so clean. Every class, lab, floor, and campus is always kept clean by...

reviews.review_heading: College experience with its infrastructure and extracurricular activities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Each department has its own Wi-Fi. Classrooms are well-maintained. The quality of the food in the canteen is very hygienic and good enough. Sports and games are not held properly, and no support is given for sports.

reviews.review_heading: Value for Money and Nice College.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure and a nice environment for study. The food quality of the mess and canteen is also good. There is a huge ground to play cricket, football, and a separate basketball court is also available. The college campus is rich with greenery. In the college campus, there is also a Gurdwara. The college campus includes certain projects like a solar power plant.

reviews.review_heading: Highly recommend. Guru Gobind Singh College provides a great curriculum, academics, and environment.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are very well-maintained. They are in a very good condition. Each department is provided with Wi-Fi. The library is very beneficial for students. The quality of food provided in the canteen is very good. The focus on sports is less.

reviews.review_heading: College of dreams. Best!
reviews.review_text: GGSF has a huge campus with well-equipped laboratories. GGSF has a very good library having a digital library with Wi-Fi and computers, having all types of technical and GK books. GGSF has spacious and well-ventilated classrooms with projectors for smart learning.

reviews.review_heading: New building for more courses. They have build new building for MBA so you can join if you want.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is quite classy but there is always room for improvement which I think they should do. First of all, they need to change mess services. All classrooms must have Wi-Fi facilities with very high connectivity.

reviews.review_heading: Really good faculty and best campus life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is the best; there is a strict dress code for both students and faculty, and Wi-Fi is available at the 3rd floor library with a variety of books. Our college does not have a hostel, so I stayed in an outside room with me and three other shared rooms with all the essential facilities, healthy mess food and a breakfast salad meal. Sports events are held once a semester.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college because of its faculty members and placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides us with all facilities. Laboratories are well-maintained. They conduct sports events. The hostel facility is not available in our college. Students have to live in rental rooms outside.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college, but I am not satisfied.
reviews.review_text: We have Wi-Fi facilities on the 3rd floor. The food in the canteen is not good. The library is good. Classrooms are good, but they are small and lack air conditioning.

reviews.review_heading: The college needs improvements as soon as poosible.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is more than adequate for every student's needs, and Wi-Fi is available on each floor. Our library is well-equipped. The labs are decent. The quality of food served is average in the hostel, and the medical facilities are excellent with the prompt response. Sports equipment is \available for all kinds of sports.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has average infrastructure and facilities, but negligible placements.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college building is pretty average. Wi-Fi connection is slow, and labs have limited equipment /or instruments. Classrooms are very basic with computers and there is a projector only in seminar halls. The library has some course-related books but there, not many books for general reading. Journals and newsletters are also in limited numbers. The college canteen has basic dishes on the menu, but the taste is good. I'm not aware of medical facilities but they do have a basketb...

college_info.intro: Vijaybhoomi School of Science & Technology offers undergraduate programmes. BTech is the flagship course offered at Vijaybhoomi School of Science & Technology. The college offers BTech specialisation in Artificial Intelligence, Computer Science & Engineering, and Integrated BTech MBA. Vijaybhoomi School of Science & Technology students are placed in top companies in various sectors. BTech students can become Research Scientists, Data Analysts, Software Developers, Database Administrators, Business Analysts, and others. Further, the average domestic package offered to the students of the 2024 batch stood at INR 13.30 LPA. The top recruiters of Vijaybhoomi School of Science and Technology in 2024 included Oracle, Arcesium, Dell, HDFC Bank, KPMG, Wipro, SAP Labs, Schneider Electric, Hexaware Technologies, Federal Bank, Classic Legends, Berkadia, etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Vijaybhoomi University prepares you for the ever growing field of AI in every industry.

review_content.Placements: The placement department is very helpful, as they are always available for your reference. They conduct training sessions where you are taught how to understand a JD, how to prepare for the same, trips and techniques for personal interviews, and mock group discussions. Many big companies like Dell, Oracle, etc. , visited the campus with competitive packages.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are AC hostels provided for all residential students with 24/7 medical services and a doctor on the campus as well. For sports enthusiasts, there is a football field, basketball court, badminton, a well-equipped gym, and even a swimming pool and horse riding. Sodexo makes really nice food in the mess with lots of varieties.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Good college with beautiful surroundings and greenery, but placements can be improved.

review_content.Placements: Most of them got internships but are not completely and fully placed. The passed-out batch contains around 15 students of B.Tech AI ML. They are initially placed with a package of 4 LPA. A few of them got jobs with packages between 5 to 10 LPA. The top role offered is AI App development intern. However, most of our B.Tech teachers try to get projects and internships through personal connections. We have a Centre of Continuous Learning and Employability which tries to arrange projects and internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are comparatively better than most of the colleges. We have Wi-Fi, computer, and Chemistry labs, as well as classrooms and libraries with textbooks and other books. The food is a little not tasty, however, it is hygienic. We have other good options to order food in the cafeteria and nearby hotels. A doctor is always available on campus along with a nurse. There are multiple sports like football, cricket, badminton, table tennis, and squash. Many tournaments and sports events also take place.

admission_process.title: Vijaybhoomi School of Science and Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Vijaybhoomi School of Science & Technology admission areopen. The college offers a full-timeBTech and MTechprogramme in various specialisations. Other than this, students can also pursue a five-year integrated course ofBTech+MBA. Vijaybhoomi School of Science & Technology admissions to all the courses are offered throughVUSAT Aptitude Test, conducted by the Vijaybhoomi University. After qualifying for the aptitude test, students are finalised through aPI round. The application process is completely online forVijaybhoomi School of Science & Technology, conducted online. Read the following article to know more about Vijaybhoomi School of Science & Technology admission, eligibility, selection criteria and admission process:

Vijaybhoomi School of Science & Technology admission to all the courses is entrance-based. The college offers anonline application. Candidates seeking admission to any courses are required to apply by visitingVijaybhoomi University'sofficial website. Candidates seeking admission can check out the updated information related toVijaybhoomi School of Science & Technology courseeligibility and selection criteria in the following table:
BTech + MBA
VUSAT Aptitude Test
Download:Vijaybhoomi University Brochure 2025

Vijaybhoomi School of Science & Technology admission process 2025is open. The university conducts VUSAT aptitude tests for admission toBTech,MTech, and BTech integrated courses. Vijaybhoomi School of Science & Technology admission is a multi-step process. Check below the step-by-step Vijaybhoomi School of Science & Technology admission process 2025:
Step 1: Vijaybhoomi School of Science & Technology Application Process 2025

The eligible candidates need to apply online on the official website of Vijaybhoomi University. It must be noted that the eligible candidates must have completed the entrance exam formalities & must have qualified the eligibility criteria for their respective courses before applying to the college.
Step 2: Vijaybhoomi School of Science & Technology Selection Process 2025
Admission to the courses isentrance-based. The college has a predefined selection process for shortlisting aspirants. The selection process includes an entrance exam for admission to all its courses.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation
After candidates get shortlisted, they need to come for the document verification. Selected candidates need to pay aVijaybhoomi School of Science & Technology course feeto confirm their admission.

courses_data.description: Vijaybhoomi School of Science and Technology BTech admission is open. The college offers a 4-year degree in BTech. Candidates seeking admission toVijaybhoomi School of Science and Technology for BTech must check out the minimum eligibility requirements set by the college and have a valid score in the VUSAT exams conducted by Vijaybhoomi University. Some of the important highlights related to Vijaybhoomi School of Science and Technology BTech admission are given below:

faqs.question: How can I get admission to BTech at Vijaybhoomi School of Science and Technology?
faqs.answer: To get admission to BTech at Vijaybhoomi School of Science and Technology, candidates must pass Class 12 as per the minimum eligibility requirements. Further, candidates are selected based on valid scores of either VUSAT entrance exam. Admission to all BTech specialisations is granted through the same process.

faqs.question: What is the fee for BTech at Vijaybhoomi School of Science and Technology?
faqs.answer: The total fee for a four-year BTech course at Vijaybhoomi School of Science and Technology ranges between INR 8 Lacs to INR 16 lakh. Other than this, candidates may also have to pay for Hostel Fee, Alumni Association and Student Council Fund, separately. However, this information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

faqs.question: How to get admission to Vijaybhoomi School of Science and Technology?
faqs.answer: Vijaybhoomi School of Science & Technology admissions are entrance-based. Candidates must fill an online application form for their desired programme. Further, candidates must qualify for either VUSAT, which is conducted by Vijaybhoomi University.

faqs.question: Can I apply for Vijaybhoomi School of Science and Technology admission?
faqs.answer: Vijaybhoomi School of Science and Technology admissions are open for all courses. The college offers entrance-based admission to all UG and PG courses. Candidates seeking admission to Vijaybhoomi School of Science and Technology must fill out the online application form by visiting the Vijaybhoomi University official website.

faqs.question: What is the application process of Vijaybhoomi School of Science & Technology?
faqs.answer: Vijaybhoomi School of Science & Technology application window is open. Candidates must apply for various courses on the official website. Candidates can check out the step-by-step application process below:Step 1:Visit the official website of Vijaybhoomi University(vijaybhoomi.edu.in).Step 2:Register with a valid email id and phone number.Step 3:Fill in the required details, including educational qualifications and personal details.Step 4: Pay the application fee.Step 5:Submit the application form.

placement_data.title: Vijaybhoomi School of Science and Technology Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: Vijaybhoomi School of Science and Technology has a Placement Cell that provides placement assistance to all of its students. The placement process at Vijaybhoomi School of Science and Technology includes a comprehensive pre-placement training and skill development program for the students. Students are put through a series of workshops, guest lectures, seminars, and simulation exercises to become ready to meet the ever-changing corporate challenges.

Recently, Vijaybhoomi School of Science and Technology has released the salary stats for the batch that passed out in 2024 . As per the latest report, the average global package offered during Vijaybhoomi School of Science and Technology placements 2024 stood at INR 85 LPA , whereas the average domestic package offered stood at INR 13.30 LPA . The participating recruiters presented various new-age job offers to the students of the batch 2024. The top recruiters of Vijaybhoomi School of Science and Technology in 2024 included Oracle, Arcesium, Dell, HDFC Bank, KPMG, Wipro, SAP Labs, Schneider Electric, Hexaware Technologies, Federal Bank, Classic Legends, Berkadia, etc.

Vijaybhoomi School of Science and Technology also collaborated with many government organizations, such as the Indo-French Chamber of Commerce and Industry (IFCCI), Global Business School Network (GBSN), and Bombay Chamber of Commerce, to help students in their training program.

reviews.review_heading: Vijaybhoomi University prepares you for the ever growing field of AI in every industry.
reviews.review_text: There are AC hostels provided for all residential students with 24/7 medical services and a doctor on the campus as well. For sports enthusiasts, there is a football field, basketball court, badminton, a well-equipped gym, and even a swimming pool and horse riding. Sodexo makes really nice food in the mess with lots of varieties.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with beautiful surroundings and greenery, but placements can be improved.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are comparatively better than most of the colleges. We have Wi-Fi, computer, and Chemistry labs, as well as classrooms and libraries with textbooks and other books. The food is a little not tasty, however, it is hygienic. We have other good options to order food in the cafeteria and nearby hotels. A doctor is always available on campus along with a nurse. There are multiple sports like football, cricket, badminton, table tennis, and squash. Many tournaments and spor...

college_info.college_name: PR Pote Patil College of Engineering and Management: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025

highlights.summary: Here are some additional updates regarding the P. R. Pote Patil College of Engineering and Management:

college_info.intro:
PR Pote Patil College of Engineering and Management offers BTech and MBA as its flagship programmes. BTech at the college is offered for the duration of 4 years at the UG level. The specialisations include Electrical Engineering, Telecommunication Engineering, Electronics Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, and Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning, among others.
Apart from this, MBA is provided at the PG level for the duration of 2 years. Admission to the MBA course is based on entrance exams such as MAT, XAT, CAT, CMAT, ATMA, and MAH CET. The minimum eligibility is to pass graduation with 50% aggregate marks from a recognised board. Candidates can take a detailed below at the PR Pote Patil College of Engineering and Management popular programmes:

placements.overview: PR Pote Patil College of Engineering and Management placement report 2025 has not been released yet. However, the college has an active training, placement and career counselling cell. In 2024, over 663 job offers were made for the batch of 2024. The college organises soft skill training, GD competition, seminars, coding competitions, seminars and technical workshops. Candidates can take a look below at the top recruiters of PR Pote Patil College of Engineering and Management:

faqs.answer: A:    P. R. Pote Patil College of Engineering and Management has been rated 3.5 on placements.
faqs.question: Does P. R. Pote Patil College of Engineering and Management provide good placement facilities?

faqs.answer: A:    To get admission to PR Pote Patil College of Engineering and Management, candidates must fulfil the eligibility criteria set by the college. For the BTech course, the minimum eligibility requirement is to pass Class 12 with 45% aggregate marks with Physics and Maths as compulsory subjects from a recognised board. Candidates are required to qualify for any national-level entrance exam, among JEE Main or MHT CET.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for BTech at PR Pote Patil College of Engineering and Management?

faqs.answer: A:    PR Pote Patil College of Engineering and Management specifies the minimum qualification required to apply for a course. The basic eligibility for UG courses is Class 12 whereas graduation is required for PG programmes. Below is the course-wise eligibility for PRPCEM:CourseCommon EligibilityBTechClass 12 with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects along with one among Chemistry/ Biotechnology/ Biology/ Technical Vocational subject/ Computer Science/Information Technology/ Informatics Practices/ Agriculture/ Engineering Graphics/Business Studies with at least 45% aggregateMTechBachelor's degree in relevant subjects with at least 50% aggregateMBABachelor's degree in any discipline with at least 50% aggregateMCABachelor's degree in relevant subjects with at least 50% aggregatePhDMaster's degree or equivalent with at least 55% aggregate (50% aggregate for SC/ ST/ OBC-NCL/ Differently-Abled/ Other categories)
faqs.question: What is the qualification required to apply at PR Pote Patil College of Engineering and Management?

faqs.answer: A:    Candidates who have passed a bachelor's degree with a minimum of 50% aggregate are eligible to apply for PR Pote Patil College of Engineering and Management MBA programme. Aspirants must hold the documents proving their eligibility for verification at the time of admission. Besides, candidates must also pass any of the accepted entrance exams for admission.
faqs.question: Who is eligible for MBA at PR Pote Patil College of Engineering and Management?

faqs.answer: A:    The total tuition fee for PR Pote College of Engineering and Management MBA is INR 1.9 lakh. Candidates who are selected for admission have to pay the course fee to confirm their seat. There is some relaxation in fee for SC, ST, SBC, EBC and other reserved category candidates.
