reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Review of P. R. Pote Patil College of Engineering and Management.

review_content.Placements: In our college, there are very good placements and reputable companies visiting our college. The placement process is held with the help of the placement office. Companies like Infosys, Wipro, Capgemini, etc., participate. The highest package a student secured in college is 16 LPA. Good internships are available at companies like HCL, Amazon, Dell, Facebook, and many from abroad came to the university for student selection. On average, packages range from 4 LPA to the highest at 18 LPA. If we study, we can secure good placements as desired, and there are multiple rounds of interviews.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Review of P. R. Pote Patil College of Engineering and Management.

review_content.Placements: The placement cell of the college is very active, and they call the students for campus placements from the 4th semester. Almost 80% of students get placed on the campus. The college also trained us properly before the placement. Many big IT companies visit the campus for recruitment. The company names are Capgemini, Hexaware, Amazon, Dell, HP, GlobalLogic, TCS, Infosys, etc. The list is never-ending. At the time of the final year, the institute takes a lot of helpful steps for the betterment of students. The average package is 6 LPA, whereas the highest package is 10 LPA.

Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

content.Placements: The placement is also good. The chance of getting placed is really very high. Every major recruiter comes, and many big IT companies like TCS, Wipro, Amazon, Practo, etc., visit the campus for recruitment. The average package is 6 LPA, whereas the highest package is 10 LPA. Almost 80% of students get placed from the campus. There are good internships. Big companies like TCS, Wipro, Amazon, Byju's, and Google offer internships. They provide us with many internships and help students nourish their talent, getting them ready for a bright future so they can get good placements.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Review of P. R. Pote Patil College of Engineering and Management.

content.Placements: In our college, there are very good placements and reputable companies visiting our college. The placement process is held with the help of the placement office. Companies like Infosys, Wipro, Capgemini, etc., participate. The highest package a student secured in college is 16 LPA. Good internships are available at companies like HCL, Amazon, Dell, Facebook, and many from abroad came to the university for student selection. On average, packages range from 4 LPA to the highest at 18 LPA. If we study, we can secure good placements as desired, and there are multiple rounds of interviews.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Review of P. R. Pote Patil College of Engineering and Management.

content.Placements: The placement cell of the college is very active, and they call the students for campus placements from the 4th semester. Almost 80% of students get placed on the campus. The college also trained us properly before the placement. Many big IT companies visit the campus for recruitment. The company names are Capgemini, Hexaware, Amazon, Dell, HP, GlobalLogic, TCS, Infosys, etc. The list is never-ending. At the time of the final year, the institute takes a lot of helpful steps for the betterment of students. The average package is 6 LPA, whereas the highest package is 10 LPA.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: My review about this college.

content.Placements: Placements are excellent, with many well known and respected companies visiting. The highest package offered was about 18 LPA. The average package is around 5 to 6 LPA and it depends on a student skills. Various companies visit for different specializations. For systems, software companies like TCS and Infosys recruit. For operations companies such as JBL and Maersk visit. For finance, J.P. Morgan, CUB, South Indian Bank and ICICI are some of the companies. For marketing Red Bull and many others visit. There are also great internships available with large companies like Amazon, Byjus and Google.

faqs.question: Can I get admission at PR Pote Patil College of Engineering and Management without JEE Main?
faqs.answer: Yes, candidates can get admission in PR Pote Patil College of Engineering and Management without JEE Main score. JEE Main is one of the accepting exams required for admission to BTech course. However, aspirants can also get admission in BTech based on their score in MHT CET. It is a state-level entrance test conducted once in a year in online mode. Hence, it is not mandatory to pass JEE Main for admission.

faqs.question: Is entrance exam required for admission at PR Pote Patil College of Engineering and Management?
faqs.answer: Yes, PR Pote Patil College of Engineering and Management considers entrance exam scores for admission. Aspirants with a valid score in any of the accepted national or state-level entrance exams are offered seat. Below is the course-wise accepted entrance exams for PR Pote Patil College of Engineering and Management admissions:CourseAccepted Entrance ExamsBTechMHT CET/ JEE MainMTechGATE/ MHT CET MTechMBAMAT/ XAT/ CAT/ CMAT/ ATMA/ MAH CETMCAMAH MCA CETPhDPET/ UGC-NET/ CSIR NET/ SLET/ GATE/ GPAT

faqs.question: How can I get admission at PR Pote Patil College of Engineering and Management?
faqs.answer: PR Pote Patil College of Engineering and Management is based on entrance-exam scores. The college accepts national, state and university-level entrance tests for admission. Aspirants must pass MHT CET or JEE Main for BTech, GATE or MHT CET M.Tech for M.Tech and MAH MCA CET for MCA programmes. Besides, candidates can appear for PET conducted by the university for PhD programmes or provide a valid score in UGC-NET, CSIR-NET, SLET, GATE, etc. for admission.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at PR Pote Patil College of Engineering and Management?
faqs.answer: PR Pote Patil College of Engineering and Management offers admission to courses based on entrance exam scores. Candidates have to first apply for preferred entrance exam and then appear for the same. The college accepts entrance exams such as MHT CET, MAH MBA CET, MAH MCA CET, etc. for admission to specific programmes. Hence, there is no direct admission and candidates need to participate in each selection round for a seat in the college.

reviews.review_heading: My review about this college.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities were good on an average better than any other college's hostel. The food facilities offered were too good and changed every week. There were 2 shared rooms and also separate rooms available. There was a good and healthy environment.

reviews.review_heading: My review of this college.
reviews.review_text: Our college hostel is also of very good quality. The rooms in our college hostel are nice, and each room has 3 students. The food in the hostel is also of very good quality, and the students can live very comfortably.

reviews.review_heading: Review of P. R. Pote Patil College of Engineering and Management.
reviews.review_text: The course curriculum was designed to help us understand the real market requirements for companies. We were provided with real case studies to solve in our classes. The faculty members are experienced and very knowledgeable. They focus on both theory and practical learning, allowing students to grasp concepts through hands-on experience. reviews.review_heading: Review of P. R. Pote Patil College of Engineering and Management.
reviews.review_text: The course is very useful as new technologies are emerging. Everything nowadays is getting digital, so this course is also evolving with many new changes. Guide us in many ways and efficiently in computer programming languages like C, C++, Java, HTML, etc. The computer lab is good for understanding those things by yourself. The h...

reviews.review_heading: My review about this college.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are good and the room accommodation is awesome. When it comes to the food, there is a slight drawback. But, there are canteens where we can pay and eat so we don't bother about the hostel food. In the canteen, we get good food until 12 a.m., which helped us during exam times when we went to the canteen to relax at night.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements in batch 2025. Nearly 600+ students are placed and best faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Our college has best infrastructure. There is a special stuff in college that maintains the college cleanliness. Best college I have ever seen. The exam conducted at the college is maintained by the college discipline. I would like to suggest this college to everyone. All labs are digital, and Wi-Fi is also provided.

reviews.review_heading: Review of MBA college: placements, teaching, and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The institute has a well-developed infrastructure for the MBA program. It provides all essential facilities such as labs, a library, a canteen, sports equipment, and Wi-Fi. The quality of facilities is satisfactory, and the food served in the canteen is affordable and decent. A hostel facility is also available in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfactory experience and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: In the department area, there is a library. Both online and offline data resources are available. Our classrooms and computer labs are quite updated and have Wi-Fi all over. The hostel is also clean and quite well-maintained. Other facilities include a mess, sports ground, recreational areas, and medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Overall the experience is satisfactory.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure in the department area is quite good. Facilities include a computer laboratory and Wi-Fi. Classrooms have modern and visual aids. The library is good. The hostel provides comfortable rooms. We have mess facilities and recreational areas.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with placements.
reviews.review_text: The college provides infrastructure support like classrooms, computer labs, networking labs, Wi-Fi access though limited at times, and a library. The hostel accommodation with have rooms, a mess, and medical facilities. The Wi-Fi facility is available in the hostel as well.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with quite reasonable fees.
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure. Surroundings are taken care of. The department area has necessities like good classrooms with smart boards, a very big library, and a Wi-Fi connection. The living space for hostel accommodation provided is good. The mess food is not that bad average in taste.

reviews.review_heading: College provides best faculty and placements.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure of the college are supportive. The facilities that are provided by the college are good and help students to live. The classrooms are very good, and the labs and library that are in the college are peaceful. Students can easily learn many things.

reviews.review_heading: College is really good for students coming from rural areas or a moderate background.
reviews.review_text: There is a library not very large or small and there is a specific library for every department. There are labs available. There is no boy's hostel offered by college. The canteen has average food but medical college is in camps so good medical facilities are provided.

reviews.review_heading: Best college of 2024 in Amravati, better placement.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, and I like it. There is no hostel available, but the course they provide is very nice. The Wi-Fi speed and computers are very decent, and I think the classrooms are slightly better than other colleges. The infrastructure is very good.

reviews.review_heading: Well-dignified faculty, neat and clean campus, well-disciplined.

Campus quality of facility is little bit good. Canteen is better. Food: Canteens offer a variety of food options to meet the needs and preferences of students, including vegetarian, vegan, and gluten-free options. reviews_list.review_title: College placement is satisfactory.

review_content.Placements: Around 60% - 70% of students are placed in this course. Students are placed both on-campus and off-campus. The highest salary package offered was 8 LPA, the average salary package offered is 4 LPA. And the lowest salary package offered around 2 LPA. JSW and Shyam Metallics are the top recruiting companies in our college. No internships are conducted in our college. Their chances of getting placed are not much worth it. The top roles offered in our course are mental testing in companies and manager positions.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus has free Wi-Fi in hostel. The college is undergoing construction for the central library. All classrooms are equipped with smart boards. Labs are average in maintenance. The quality of food available in the canteen is average, and the hostels are in good condition. Medical facilities are also available. It has facilities for sports, games, and NCC.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: This college is an average experience.

review_content.Placements: Around 60% of students in the CSE department get placed. The highest salary package offered was 5 LPA, the average salary package offered was 3 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered was 1 LPA- 1.5 LPA. There are no internships provided by the college. If you want to internship at any company, you must first get permission from the college before applying.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are quite good, with Wi-Fi available only for administrative work, but not for students. Sufficient labs are present for the current department, and classrooms are quite good. A larger central library is under construction, while a smaller one is already available inside the college. Hostel provides decent facilities, although the Wi-Fi worked better in the initial days. After a few months, the Wi-Fi started facing frequent issues. In my opinion. Water facilities provided are not entirely hygienic and require timely sanitation. Additionally, during the summer, there can be a scarcity of water in the hostel. Quality of food in the mess and canteen is not very impressive at the moment. Hostel is located 3-4 km away from the hospital.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: My experience at Government College of Engineering, Keonjhar.

review_content.Placements: Around 50% of students were placed in our college, but in our branch, only 5%-10% of students were placed. Placement scenario is very poor, especially for our branch. Top recruiting companies include Tech Mahindra, Adani, and others.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are 2-3 labs in each department, and one library in our college, which also provides Wi-Fi, though some connections are not working properly. Food in our hostel is good now, but it was poor a few months ago. However, food is still not properly managed in our hostel canteen.

content.Placements: Placement opportunities at this college are poor. In our course, only 20-30% of students were placed. The highest package was 4-5 Lacs, and the lowest was 2-3 Lacs. content.Infrastructure: The college provides Wi-Fi in the library and in every block of the hostel. There are several classrooms and labs in every department, and the college also has a library. The food is now good to eat, and the hostel is a good place to stay.

admission_process.title: Government College of Engineering, Biju Patnaik University of Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Government College of Engineering, Biju Patnaik University of Technology admissionis through qualifying exam scores of the candidates. The institute offers courses at UG level in stream includingEngineering.Government College of Engineering, Biju Patnaik University of Technologyadmission is granted based on performance of the aspirants in exams, such asJEE Main and OJEE. Candidates must register online on the institute’s website. For the offline availability of the application form, students must check with the college admission department.
Candidates have to pay a total tuition fee ofINR 1,12,200 - 1,39,600for UG level. Besides tuition fee, students also need to pay caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, etc.
Typically, the duration of the UG level courses ranges between 3 years - 4 years.

reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is present in both college and hostel, but in our college, it is only available in the library. There are several classrooms in all branches in our college. The quality of food is good, and in our hostel, the sweeper cleans every week.

reviews.review_heading: Some Unknown Facts about GCE, Keonjhar.
reviews.review_text: In our college campus, Wi-Fi is not working properly. There are some labs and also a library. In our hostel, the cleaning is not done on time. There is Wi-Fi in our hostel, but some of these Wi-Fi connections are not working properly, and those that do work provide a very slow network. There are fewer sports, games, and medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: The worst experience in this college.
reviews.review_text: In our college, Wi-Fi, labs, and a library are present. Wi-Fi is not working properly. One Wi-Fi is available in each wing or block. In our hostel, there is a sweeper who cleans the hostel once in 3-4 days duration. The food quality is not good, but it is going to be good.

reviews.review_heading: A Brief Review of Government College of Engineering, Keonjhar.
reviews.review_text: The environment is quite good, but facilities are not good enough. There is no proper Wi-Fi facility; we only got 34 MB per day. The classrooms are smart and technologically advanced, but no action is provided. The hostel for 1st-year students is quite good, but the senior hostels need some repair. The food is okay but not healthy at all. The medical facilities are near the college. Sports facilities are terrible.

reviews.review_heading: Mining is the best course here - be wise.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not as I expected when I first got admission. There are labs for many subjects and a library, but it could be better considering the legacy this college has. Regarding the quality of the facilities, it is not so good. If you have any chronic disease or frequent health issues, please don't come here.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good, but not as much as I expected .
reviews.review_text: The Campus has free Wi-Fi in the campus and hostel. The college is undergoing construction for the central library. All classrooms are attached with smart boards. The quality of food available in the canteen is average, and the hostels are in good condition. The medical facilities are also available. It has great facilities for sports, games, and NCC.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied, but it's not that good a college as I expected.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good; it has fields for cricket, badminton, volleyball, basketball, and many more sports. Hostels are not so good—no hygiene, and the food is not good, but the rooms are big. The average washrooms are not maintained and cleaned properly, and there are no personal medical services; we have to go 7 km to the nearest hospital.

reviews.review_heading: Some knowledge about the GCE, KEONJHAR
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure in our college is also poor due to its non-maintenance in our college day-to-day . Our hostel contains Wi-Fi in each corridor, but sometimes these are not working and also these are running very slowly. The classrooms are cleaned every day, and also the labs. The quality of the facilities in our hostel is so poor due to its non-cleaning regularly. There are no sports and medical facilities in our hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Unbiased review of GCE, KEONJHAR, totally ruined my life
reviews.review_text: The facilities were quite below average, as we were told we would get free Wi-Fi and washing machines, but they are not working properly. The labs are air-conditioned, but the computers are very slow and not functioning properly. The library facility is decent, but the food quality is not good, and we get sick most of the time, so we mostly order from outside. There were no medical facilities, and the sports facilities were also decent.

reviews.review_heading: GCE keonjhar detail review
reviews.review_text: Wifi is available in hostel but doesn't work every time, so most of time you have to use your own internet. Labs are okay. Classrooms are okay but no ac. Library is there, books are available, reading room is also there but not of good quality and timing is not adequate. By the way a new building is being prepared for library that will be in 2025 I  think. Food quality is not so good. Government medical is ~5 km from campus. No transport facility. fees_and_eligibility.overview: Samrat Ashok Technological Institute offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time and Part Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.E. / B.Tech and BBA. Whereas, at PG level, Samrat Ashok Technological Institute offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and M.Sc. Samrat Ashok Technological Institute fee structure for all the courses is around INR 60,000 to 4,80,000.

faqs: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
description: Samrat Ashok Technological Institute cutoff 2025 is finally out for aspirants seeking admission to the BTech and Integrated BTech courses. The JoSAA Round 1 seat allotment result 2025 has been released as opening and closing ranks across different categories belonging to the AI and HS quotas. Candidates can scroll down to this page to view the Samrat Ashok Technological Institute JEE Main cutoff 2025 for various specialisations and categories. A few more updates are below:
NTA has released the JEE Main Result 2024 for Session 2. Candidates can download their scorecard from the NTA website jeemain.nta.ac.in.
The Joint Seat Allocation Authority (JoSAA) will start the registration for JEE Main Counselling 2024 on June 10. A total of 6 rounds of JEE Main 2024 counselling will be conducted.

Samrat Ashok Technological Institute cutoff 2025 was released via MPBE entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff range was between 144866 and 291071 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 144866, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission. In the first round, the cutoff rank for the same branch was 114932.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General AI category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 144866.
For more categories, rounds and quotas, candidates must use the provided filters.
Some of the important dates related to JEE Main 2026 for admission are provided below. Candidates can keep track of the upcoming dates to be eligible for admission.
The cutoff PDFs below can be downloaded to view the cutoff details of the last three years for multiple rounds. This will help students understand the past years' cutoff trends.

To make an informed decision students must compare different colleges accepting JEE Main for admission. The given below comparison data is based on the JEE Main last round cutoff data. The cutoff is for the General AI category.

Considering the Samrat Ashok Technological Institute B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025, the top three most competitive specialisations for General AI category students were B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering, B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science and B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning), with last-round closing ranks of 144866, 177248, and 179229, respectively.

reviews.review_heading: This college is average.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure of college and hostel. Wi-Fi is available in all the rooms of the hostel and classrooms. Library is available for studying during the day. reviews.review_heading: For core branches, this college is really excellent.
reviews.review_text: College main building infrastructure is too good looking and reliable from the outside, but classes are outdated and some departments need to renovate. There is a good central library, and the campus has all types of labs, such as heat engine lab, physics lab.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for the students who want to achieve very high in there life.

reviews.review_heading: Review of my college campus.

Wi-Fi is available but the speed of Wi-Fi is not that fast. There is a library in which you can study during the day.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure is not so good, faculty is helpful and acknowledgeable and experienced.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering (Second Shift) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the college. It has good facilities and infrastructure.

content.Placements: You can go for the B.Tech course, which is very popular here. You just need to study as hard as you can for your placement.
content.Infrastructure: The room quality is the best, they are clean, and the facilities are good. Sometimes the mess gives poor quality food, but the rest of the time, I've seen that the quality is quite good. You can have a good dinner and lunch. The mess is also so big, and you have a lot of options for changing the mess. There are 4-5 messes. According to you, you can change it monthly.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering (First Shift) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Overall, the campus is good.

content.Placements: They have good placements. Even the package ranges from 4.5 LPA to 7.5 LPA. Recruiting companies are Microsoft, Google, Capgemini, and Cognizant. College provides the training for interviews for 1 year itself, as software engineer, developer, and many more. The highest salary is 20 LPA, and the lowest salary is 4.5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi and water electricity 24X7 are provided. Cleaning is done on a daily basis. Overall, classrooms are good and have a big library at the college. The food is okay. There are 4-5 canteens even cafe and fruit stalls are there on campus. Hospital is available on campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering (First Shift) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Sinhgad institute of technology.

content.Placements: My branch is Computer Engineering. Gives good placements. The highest placement is 14.26 LPA and the average placement is 5 to 6 LPA. I am a first-year student. The average placement is 5 to 6 LPA. The highest placement is 28 LPA. This is in Germany, not in India. The lowest package is 3 LPA, but not in Computer Engineering or IT Engineering. The lowest package is in other branches.
content.Infrastructure: On my campus, there is old infrastructure. But the infrastructure is good. The campus has a sports complex and a canteen. In the sports complex, there is a manual ground for one like suppose, for football, we have 2 to 3 football grounds, and there are also other games like cricket. My campus is big and very good, and my branch has a special building on the campus and also labs.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and location.

content.Placements: Around 80% of students get placed on campus. The lowest package is around 2.3 LPA and the highest is about 10 LPA. content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi speed is best. Labs are structured, classrooms have smart projectors with great seating arrangements and all. Best library and digital libraries also there. And free-of-cost medical facilities are available.
content.Faculty: The staff is well-qualified and knowledgeable. Many students are ready to work in the industry. Many courses are available and provided to students to help in student development. hostel_campus.college_name: SIT - Sinhgad Institute of Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description:
Separate wing for the foreign student in both boys and girls hostels with additional facilities for cooking and washing
Hostels have fully furnished rooms, TV, secured Wi-Fi, dining hall, sufficient number of toilets, furniture and recreation area

library.description:
The central library is enriched by 46500 books with 12000 titles of various books of all disciplines of Engineering, Management and Sciences. Along with 5000 reference books, it also has 207 national/ international periodicals and journals. The library also possesses 1300 CDs as offline databases. 
A dedicated six storey building with huge reading halls and modern amenities is allotted to the library facilities of the campus and the central library is open for 24 hours on all days in a year with the seating capacity of more than 3500.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college. It has good facilities and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The room quality is the best, they are clean, and the facilities are good. Sometimes the mess gives poor quality food, but the rest of the time, I've seen that the quality is quite good. You can have a good dinner and lunch. The mess is also so big, and you have a lot of options for changing the mess. There are 4-5 messes. According to you, you can change it monthly.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the campus is good.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi and water electricity 24X7 are provided. Cleaning is done on a daily basis. Overall, classrooms are good and have a big library at the college. The food is okay. There are 4-5 canteens even cafe and fruit stalls are there on campus. Hospital is available on campus.

reviews.review_heading: Sinhgad institute of technology.
reviews.review_text: On my campus, there is old infrastructure. But the infrastructure is good.  The campus has a sports complex and a canteen. In the sports complex, there is a manual ground for one like suppose, for football, we have 2 to 3 football grounds, and there are also other games like cricket. My campus is big and very good, and my branch has a special building on the campus and also labs.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and location.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi speed is best. Labs are structured, classrooms have smart projectors with great seating arrangements and all.  Best library and digital libraries also there. And free-of-cost medical facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: The college has a future scope for students.
reviews.review_text: There are so many facilities in our college like libraries, Wi-Fi, labs and classrooms. The hostel quality is very nice and the mess is also very nice. The menu card is good. Sports in the college are at a high level. The hostel has geysers, fans, study tables, and many other things.

reviews.review_heading: Good life for a good experience in the college.
reviews.review_text: College provides many facilities for the staffs and students. In that like a library, reading halls, water, Wi-Fi, and suitable classrooms. Hostel is good for students because hostel provides each student with bed, cupboard, table, chair, etc. Food quality of mess is good. Sports and games are conducted by the college for students. Many types of activities are given to students in college.

reviews.review_heading: College life is good but not satisfied by placement.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good, lots of facilities are available on college campus like a gym. There is reading hall for studying, you get a chance to see nature. Hostel room is big enough and mess food is average. There is a big playground and lots of sports facilities are available in college. There is a hospital for medical emergencies.

reviews.review_heading: The college is very good.
reviews.review_text: On the college campus, Wi-Fi is available. Labs are available for each department. The library is very big. Hostels are available. Mess food is average, and canteens are available. On-campus medical facilities are available. A sports ground is also available. The sports complex is available.

reviews.review_heading: I think the college has a good placement percentage.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available. Labs are available. Classrooms and the library are really good. Mess quality is always good, and sports and medical facilities are helpful for students. For sports, in the college ground, there is a big sports complex for students. Many sports games are played in that complex.

reviews.review_heading: Review about SIT Lonavla.
reviews.review_text: Facilities like gym, cafe, sports accessories as well as their grounds were available to students here. Yes, classrooms as well as hostels had Wi-Fi too. Hostel rooms were quite decent. 24-hour water service is provided, and there is no need to worry about electricity availability. The hostel food they provide is quite average in taste, but still, it depends on which mess you choose. The mess change process is held every month.

reviews.review_heading: If we like fresh air, then this college is good, otherwise, we must go with the affordable college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is not good. Wi-Fi is only available in the 1st and 2nd year student hostels, with 24-hour access in the reading hall. Classrooms are not well-maintained, they have old fans and benches. Food in the mess is not good, we may lose 10 kgs in our first year. There are 4 canteens, but none of them have tasty food. Campus has a big cricket ground, but they don't allow us to play on it. We can play other available sports. Medical facilities are average.

reviews.review_heading: I am happy with my campus friends.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is available in our college. It provides high-speed internet access throughout the campus including classrooms, labs, common areas, computer labs, and AIML data cloud computing labs. There are smart classrooms with projectors and sound systems. A good hostel facility is available. Rooms are well-ventilated and clean.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely don't take admission in this college.
reviews.review_text: This college is outside the city, so you have options for rooms outside the campus, but for your convenience, you have to take a hostel and are compelled to use the college mess. College facilities are good; Wi-Fi and lab staff are also good for some subjects.

reviews.review_heading: The tables of Sinhgad Institute of Technology, Lonavla.
reviews.review_text: The view of the hostel is excellent, the whole Lonavla can be seen with the naked eye. There is a very good view of the hostel. Sports feels like I'm in IIT Mandi. Wi-Fi is everywhere in college, but Wi-Fi is like 1 Mbps in hostels and colleges, although the infrastructure is better.

reviews.review_heading: This college is famous for its events, and I assure you, taking admission is worth it!
reviews.review_text: The hostels are good, and the college infrastructure is very nice, featuring beautiful scenery with waterfalls. Facilities are provided in a well-mannered way, and the mess and canteen food tastes good. All types of sports are available, along with extracurricular activities. There is strong Wi-Fi all over the campus.

individual_reviews.title: Good but not best, the infrastructure is very poor.

content.Placements: No core companies are there for the placements. Only call centre and IT jobs are coming to the cell and for the interviews. The management is publishing 100 percent placements, but the truth is only a very few students are placed in core companies; others are placed in IT companies.
content.Infrastructure: Poor infrastructure, and the total campus area is very small when compared with other engineering colleges in the same university. The basic lab infrastructure is even not available. The tools are very poor, and the new tools have not yet been updated since years.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Mostly the management is really good and other facilities are superb.

content.Placements: As too many companies are there for providing placements. The companies like TCS, Infosys, etc. are here for offering placement opportunities. We have to be trained with the nowadays technologies. The college is providing many courses to upskill yourself, so don't panic about the placements.
content.Infrastructure: The college maintains a good infrastructure. The library is superb. Wi-Fi facilities are provided in the library, halls, etc. Hostel facilities are quite good. Classrooms are maintained in a good manner. There is a canteen where various dishes are available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: College life is good but a bit strict.

content.Placements: Placements are above average as of last year, This year it might get even better. Mahindra is one of the best company we have. Almost 60%-70% of students got internships from the college. The highest salary packages are covered by computer science students.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are really good on campus. It is currently undergoing construction to improve.Infrastructure will be completed shortly different labs with cleanliness are available. Computer labs with modern CPUs, monitors, and labs are safe with safety measures.

individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with CCE.

content.Placements: Almost 75% of the students are getting an average of 5 LPA from campus placements. The highest package was 11 LPA. Companies like TCS, Wipro, etc., came for campus interviews. Most students were offered internships with the help of faculty members. A key point is that everyone got their job in their respective fields rather than everyone being placed in the IT sector.
content.Infrastructure: All the classrooms are equipped with advanced teaching tools. The labs are well-stocked with everything from basic references to GATE coaching books. We have 3 air-conditioned computer labs with excellent systems. The canteen provides high-quality food based on my experience.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied due to strictness and lack of events.

content.Placements: We get good support from our faculty members. About 60% of students get placed within their field. The average package is 3 LPA. The highest package is 15 LPA. Companies like TCS, Infosys, and Wipro are here for recruitment. The college supports internships and tries to provide it from 3rd year.
content.Infrastructure: We got 2 computer labs with good Wi-Fi connections. About 60 computers are in each labs. Good classroom with a big smartboard, which allows us to understand topics easily with video references. The food at the canteen is average. We have a library with decent books which are useful for our studies.

reviews.review_heading: Good but not best, the infrastructure is very poor.
reviews.review_text: Poor infrastructure, and the total campus area is very small when compared with other engineering colleges in the same university. The basic lab infrastructure is even not available. The tools are very poor, and the new tools have not yet been updated since years.

reviews.review_heading: Mostly the management is really good and other facilities are superb.
reviews.review_text: The college maintains a good infrastructure. The library is superb. Wi-Fi facilities are provided in the library, halls, etc. Hostel facilities are quite good. Classrooms are maintained in a good manner. There is a canteen where various dishes are available.

reviews.review_heading: College life is good but a bit strict.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are really good on campus. It is currently undergoing construction to improve.Infrastructure will be completed shortly different labs with cleanliness are available. Computer labs with modern CPUs, monitors, and labs are safe with safety measures.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with CCE.
reviews.review_text: All the classrooms are equipped with advanced teaching tools. The labs are well-stocked with everything from basic references to GATE coaching books. We have 3 air-conditioned computer labs with excellent systems. The canteen provides high-quality food based on my experience.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied due to strictness and lack of events.
reviews.review_text:
We got 2 computer labs with good Wi-Fi connections. 
About 60 computers are in each labs. 
Good classroom with a big smartboard, which allows us to understand topics easily with video references.
The food at the canteen is average. 
We have a library with decent books which are useful for our studies.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty, good placements.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are well maintained with smartboards, CCTV and projectors. Well ventilated and bright. Wi-Fi is made available on each floor. The college canteen is average and also spacious. Sports hours have been provided by the college. Hostel facilities are not so good but they are working on expanding the facilities.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with good faculty members, grounds, events, and placements of my college.
reviews.review_text: The college has very good and modern infrastructure. We have good Wi-Fi, labs for all the respective branches of courses, Matlab subscription, Library, vast ground, basketball ground, parking slots for college buses, etc. The quality of the hostel is good. Food is good. Sports competitions are actively held in our campus.

reviews.review_heading: High placements and best faculty members.
reviews.review_text: There is a Wi-Fi available on each floor with an average speed. The canteen is better now as they built a new canteen which is very spacious. Sports hours have been provided by the college. There are no big courtyards or grounds to play, you have to adjust with a small ground and a basketball court. Hostel is average and they are planning on expanding it’s size to accommodate more students.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements and academic training is good.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is provided, labs are open after 4 p.m. for working on projects, there is a good library, a hostel and sports and games grounds and equipment are provided. The college canteen provides good food with a different menu each day and it is open until 9 p.m. and provides good food.

reviews.review_heading: I am very satisfied with faculty members, placements, and facilities of this college.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are well-maintained with smart boards and CCTV cameras. Classrooms are well-ventilated and bright. Our campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Laboratories are well-equipped. There is a decent library in this college. The food served in the hostel is average. Hospitals are available. Sports are encouraged in this college. Tournaments are also held for all kinds of sports.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good faculty members and top results.
reviews.review_text: Our college has well-equipped labs and lab staff members are helpful. Classrooms are neat and clean and have enough space. Sports competition is conducted every year. Tech fest is conducted once in 2 years. Club activities are highly encouraged in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of CCE - Christ College Of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is free all over the main block. Laboratories and classrooms are well maintained. Hostel food is good. I would prefer staying as paying guests nearby rather choosing the hostel. The canteen is small, but sufficient. College life will be memorable.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college in all aspects.
reviews.review_text: Our college has free Wi-Fi, a good cafeteria with decent food and drinks. There is also a CNC machine which only 2 colleges in Kerala have. We also have a well-maintained library and 3 computer labs. All other labs of other departments are also available. Hostel is available for both boys/girls.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with a few negatives.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college is not up to the mark. Its been just 7 years since the college started and so it may be the reason for this. Many construction works are taking place in the college for a better infrastructure and so can expect the college to have good infrastructure in the coming future.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is a good college mainly because the quality of teaching is excellent.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are remarkable in the college. Labs, classrooms and libraries are well-maintained. The quality of food, hostel and classrooms are very good. The only drawback is that the medical facilities are less in the college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: If you are coming here for B.Tech for any reason, come and work hard.

review_content.Placements: Placements aren't great. However, with the help of our placement cell, placements are improving. The college is approaching reputable companies. Efforts are being made to ensure good placements. This isn't solely the college's fault. Students should also have some responsibility. If students make zero effort, placements won't happen.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are good facilities in my department. All the lab equipment is there. The library is very good. There is Wi-Fi facility in the entire library. The classrooms are also good. In the summer, there are a lot of problems in the classes of our department due to a lack of AC. Overall good. The hostel is also very good. The hostel people are strict. There are a lot of restrictions there. These restrictions have been imposed for the good of the children. Overall, the hostel is good. The food in the mess is average. The breakfast is fine.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Good academic environment with scope for improvement in placements.

review_content.Placements: About 60 percent of students got placed through campus recruitment in the recent placement cycle. 12.5 LPA (approximately) is the highest package. The average package is about 3 to 3.5 LPA and the lowest package is between 1 LPA and 2 LPA. Top recruiting companies are TCS (Tata Consultancy Services), Infosys, HCL Technologies, and Samsung Electronics. 50 to 60 percent of students got internships in companies like HCL, Infosys, TCS, etc. Top roles offered are Software Developer Engineer, Trainee Engineer, Technical Support, Management Trainee, and Business Associate.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Review of CSJM - Chhatrapati Shahu Ji Maharaj University.

content.Placements: Placement rate in our course is average, and it is around 55 percent. The average package offered ranges from 3-4 LPA mostly. Recruiting companies that visit our college are mostly mass recruiters like TCS, Infosys, Wipro, etc. The top role offered is a junior developer.
content.Infrastructure: Our college infrastructure is quite good. It has AC classrooms and a big central library with a huge collection of books. Wi-Fi facility is available. The hostel's condition is decent and needs some renovation. The mess food is average. All medical facilities are provided by the college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Sacred Heart Degree College: Focus on enjoyment with studies.

The labs and classrooms are well developed, and their seats are comfortable. Here, Wi-Fi is available, which we can use for our needs.

admission_process.title: CSJMU Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: CSJMU admissionsto some of the courses such as BSc, MA, LLB, BA LLB, and many other courses is based on the score in the entrance exam conducted byCSJMU. While admission is granted on a merit basis to courses like MSc and BA. The university also acceptsJEE Main scores for admission to BTech. CSJMU, formerly known asKanpur University, offers 400+ degree and diploma programmes at UG and PG levels through the campus and affiliated colleges. The university provides these courses in Engineering, Law, Science, Arts, Commerce, Management, etc. The applications for all the courses shall be available on the official website of CSJMU.

CSJM University admission processincludes several steps. Candidates need to begin with registration of the course of their choice. Admission to most of the programmes is based on the merit of the aspirants in the last qualifying exam. Find below the step-wise admission details for CSJMU:
CSJMU Application Process
The mode of application is online. Eligible aspirants can apply for the course of their choice on the official website of the university.
Selection Rounds

The university selects candidates for most of the UG courses based on their merit in the last qualifying exam. For PG courses such as MBA, admission is based on CAT, MAT or SEE scores. For some of the programmes such as LLM, MCA, BPharm and M.Ed, the university may conduct an entrance exam.
Counselling

Once the selection rounds are completed, selected candidates are called for counselling and document verification. Selected candidates must confirm their seats by paying theCSJMU feeto avoid rejection.

CSJMU fee includes multiple components such as tuition, exam, admission, caution deposit, etc. Candidates are first required to pay course fee during admission to confirm their seat in the university. Talking about affordability, it is one of the reasons why many leave a degree or a college. While the availability of education loans and scholarships has made education accessible but the terms and conditions required to become eligible for a student loan or a scholarship often stand as a challenge.

Some of the BA specialisations offered at campus are:BA (Hons) EnglishBA (Hons) HindiBA (Hons) SanskritBA (Hons) PsychologyBA (Hons) PhilosophyBA Journalism and Mass Communication, etc.

faqs.question: What is the admission process for a BA at CSJMU?
faqs.answer: The admission procedure commences with the release of the application form. CSJM University releases the application form on its official website of the university. Candidates seeking admission can register and fill out the CSJMU BA (Hons) admission form. Admission to Kanpur University BA (Hons) is based on CUET-UG score and merit in the last qualifying exam. After the conclusion of the application procedure, the university releases a merit list to announce the names of the selected students.

Candidates who score below 50% aggregate can opt forOnline MBA course. The programme is same as full-time MBA and aspirants get to pursue the degree without physically attending the classes.

faqs.question: Are B.Sc admissions at CSJMU entrance-based or merit-based?
faqs.answer: BSc admissions at CSJM Universityare merit-based. Hence, no entrance exam is required. The university shortlists candidates based on their merit in Class 12. Shortlisted candidates are called for counselling and document verification.

faqs.answer: The CSJMU UPTAC Cutoff is released for admission to BTech courses for various categories under the Home State quota. The hardest course for this category proved to beB.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence), with a cutoff of98162. For more information, candidates can clickhere.

placement_data.title: CSJMU Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: According to admission brochure 2025-26, the highest package offered during Chhatrapati Shahu Ji Maharaj University placement 2025 was INR 3.2 LPA . The median package was 3.2 LPA . 440 students were placed and 81 campus drives were held in 2025. Placement 2025 process was ongoing at the time the page was updated.

A total of 16 job fairs were held and 2766 students were placed as well in the affiliated colleges of CSJMU. Earlier, as per the Annual Report 2024 , 122 campus drives were held that led to 3550 selections .

tables.context: How many BPharma students were placed during CSJMU

faqs.question: What is the highest package of CSJMU Kanpur University?
faqs.answer: The highest package recorded during CSJMU placement 2025 was INR 12.5 LPA as per the admission brochure 2025 released.

faqs.question: Is CSJMU good or bad?
faqs.answer: CSJMU provides good placement to its students. The overall highest and median package recorded during placement 2025 was 12.5 LPA and 3.2 LPA. 440 students were placed and 81 campus drives were held this year.

faqs.question: How is MBA placement at CSJMU?
faqs.answer: As per the Management NIRF report 2025, median package received by MBA students in 2024 was 3.5 LPA. 91 students were placed out of total 121 students during the placement session 2024.

faqs.question: How many BPharma students were placed during CSJMU placements?
faqs.answer: As per the BPharma placement report 2023, out of 61 BPharma graduates, 21 were placed during 2023 placements. Earlier, 24 out of 62 BPharma students were placed in 2022. From 2021 to 2023, a fluctuating trend was observed in the BPharma placement rate trends. For a better understanding candidates can refer to the table below showcasing the Chhatrapati Shahu Ji Maharaj University placement trends for BPharma: Particulars BPharma Placement Statistics (2021) BPharma Placement Statistics (2022) BPharma Placement Statistics (2023) Total students 48 62 61 Students placed 10 24 21 Placement rate 21% 39% 34% NOTE: The above details are gathered from the NIRF report 2024.

faqs.question: What is the fees of MBA in Kanpur University?
faqs.answer: CSJMU MBA tuition fee for two years is INR 1.5 lakh . This information is sourced from official website of the university/sanctioning body and is subject to change. CSJMU fees include other components such as hostel fees, library fees, caution deposit, etc. After completion of the selection rounds, aspirants need to pay course fee to confirm their seat. Apart from the course fee, aspirants also need to pay an application fee in the start for applying for the course of their choice.

faqs.question: Is CSJM University a good university for doing an MBA?
faqs.answer: CSJMU is good university for pursuing MBA. In terms of placement, median package offered to MBA students in 2024 was 3.5 LPA. Out of total 121 students, 91 students were placed and 16 students were selected for higher studies.

highlights.description: One of India’s top institutes is CSJMU. As per the NIRF Ranking 2025, the rank of the institute is #102-125 under the category Pharmacy. CSJMU is top ranked by multiple national ranking bodies for its academic offerings and renowned faculty. Its faculty has a proven track record of doing great research. The article mentioned below covers all the necessary details you need if you're interested in the CSJMU rankings.

rankings.highlight: 15th Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Uttar Pradesh In 2025

nirf.description:
CSJMU has been ranked well by the NIRF under the 'Pharmacy' category. Through the years, the NIRF rankings for CSJMU indicate the institute's strong performance in crucial areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's positive reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the NIRF. When evaluated against the ranking of the past years, it has been noticed that in the 'Pharmacy' category, the institute's ranks have shown a decreasing trend. In 2025, CSJMU fell 1 rank to #102 rank in the 'Pharmacy' category by the NIRF ranking.

college_info.college_name: CSJMU Kanpur University Scholarship Details

paragraphs: CSJM University awards financial assistance to economically weak students through mean-based scholarships funded by the University’s distinguished alumni and philanthropic institutions. The scholarships offered to the wards with low annual parental income are 25-50 per cent of the annual fee depending upon the need of the students. Such candidates are required to provide an income certificate issued by the Tehsildar or the Magistrate.

In addition to this, Kanpur University also offers merit-based scholarships to students who have secured a minimum of 60 per cent aggregate or CPI of 6.5 out of 10 in the previous qualifying exam. The names of the students for scholarships are finalised by the University Committee that comprises every year.

placements.overview: UG Degree (4 year) : In year 2017-18, for 4 year UG Degree, a total of 413 students were admitted at Tatyasaheb Kore Institute of Engineering and Technology and 584 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 584 students 496 were placed with median salary of INR 300000 and 84 students opted for higher studies. A total of 349 students were admitted in year 2018-19 for 4 year UG degree at Tatyasaheb Kore Institute of Engineering and Technologyand 522 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 522 students 477 were placed with median salary of INR 325000 and 45 students opted for higher studies. PG Degree (2 year) : In year 2019-20, for 2 year PG Degree, a total of 54 students were admitted at Tatyasaheb Kore Institute of Engineering and Technology and 11 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 11 students 4 were placed with median salary of INR 300000. A total of 67 students were admitted in year 2020-21 for 2 year PG degree at Tatyasaheb Kore Institute of Engineering and Technologyand 7 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 7 students 2 were placed with median salary of INR 300000.

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

hostel_campus.college_name: Tatyasaheb Kore Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: The best college for mechanical engineering in Kolhapur.
reviews.review_text: The college mess and hostels are very good. Food in the college mess is good and hygienic. The college environment is also good. The campus is silent. College provides various facilities like Wi-Fi, good classrooms, and a well-structured library.

reviews.review_heading: Best college in Kolhapur.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college is very good. The college has a big and very clean campus. There are lots of trees present in the college campus thats why the college environment is very good and green. The college provides all facilities such as Wi-Fi, bus, canteen, etc. The college has a big ground for sports activities.

reviews.review_heading: This is the best college to gain technical knowledge and get placed.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is very good. The college has a large area of 20 to 25 acres. The college environment is also good because many trees on the campus. All departments are very good. The college hostel is good. It provides all the necessary services to students.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, facilities, and also has decent number of placements.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of college is very good. College is fully occupied by the various trees, so greenery environment is there. The classrooms are very good with digital boards as well as with good ventilation. The college hostel is also good. The college canteen is also good. You can get many much food items in canteen at low price.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent placements in 2025 for mechanical engineering, with a good and beautiful campus.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is excellent and beautiful. New and modified labs, classrooms, and a big library are available. The hostel infrastructure is good, but the mess is not good. The quality of food available in the mess is not that good, but it's better in the canteen. The college also has gym facilities and a swimming pool.

reviews.review_heading: It has great infrastructure, supportive teachers, and an industry-oriented curriculum.
reviews.review_text: TKIET Warananagar provides facilities like well-equipped labs, Wi-Fi, modern classrooms, and a vast library. It provides separate hostels for both boys and girls with furnished rooms, 24x7 electricity, and Wi-Fi. It also provides a hygienic mess and canteen. The quality food is served at reasonable rates. The on-campus medical clinic is available. It has a gym, swimming pool, and various sports facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Tatyasaheb Kore Institute of Engineering & Technology.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is good and affordable, with spacious rooms that include cupboards. The hostel buildings are old, but the canteen is nearby and serves good food. The college mess, however, is below average, with poor food quality.

reviews.review_heading: A college with great infrastructure, supportive faculty, and good placements.
reviews.review_text: The department provides Wi-Fi-enabled classrooms, modern labs, and a well-stocked library. Hostels are clean with comfortable rooms, nutritious mess food, and a hygienic canteen. Additional facilities include a sports ground and an AFPI. The campus is safe with round-the-clock security and modern infrastructure to support student needs and extracurricular activities.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of less placement in the past 2 years & not worth it for campus life
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of my college is not too good, as we have a huge large area of campus, but the buildings are too old and small. The facilities are good; the labs have good landline connections with available Wi-Fi in labs, but not in the whole campus. The quality provided in the hostel is good, the rooms are large and enough for 3 people in one room. The canteen food is not too good, but enough to satisfy patients, with medical facilities in college and a large playground with all games.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the infrastructure and facilities,but student interaction should increase.
reviews.review_text:
The infrastructure of the college and facilities are great.
The quality of every facility is literally good, and the students are really satisfied with the quality of the facilities available in the mess and canteen. Medical facilities are good whenever needed.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college with very good teachers and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the Tatyasaheb Kore Engineering and Technology Institute is excellent. Also, all the faculty at this college are knowledgeable and well educated. Also, the library is large and good. Hostel and mess are mandatory for 1st-year students at an affordable price. The hostel fee is Rs. 38,000 per annum.

reviews.review_heading: Tkiet is academy of excellence.
reviews.review_text: Campus in lush green area. Classrooms are big have screens for teaching. All type of engineering book are available also technical journals are also available. Tkiet have 4 departments mechanical, electronics, computer Science, civil, chemical.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in our college. Students can use 3 Gb of data every day. Our college has many labs. More than 200 PCs are available in our labs.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements and has experienced teachers.
reviews.review_text: Our college provided good facilities. All lab materials were available in labs. Classrooms were clean. The library was available 24X7 for students to study, and all mechanical course books were available. The food was available in the mess and canteen. Medical facilities, sports, and games were available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with placements of this college.
reviews.review_text: We have well-equipped labs in our college. Hostel facilities are available. Mess and canteen are also available on our campus. Medical facilities are well-developed. Sports are conducted annually. A big sports ground is available. The library is also available on our campus. Classrooms are good.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Tatyasaheb Kore Institute of Engineering & Technology

likes.text: Top recruiting companies of our college are Galaxy Surfactants, TCS, Praj Industries, Vinati Organics and Laxmi Organics Mahad.
Our college also has a training and placement cell which gives the best possibility for the recruitment of students.

faqs.answer: The eligibility criteria for North Maharashtra University admissions is that candidate should have scored at least 50% aggregate at graduation (45% aggregate for backward class i.e. SC/ST/DT/NT/OBC/SBC/SEBC category candidates from Maharashtra state). For admission to this course, candidates need to follow the Online Centralised Admission Procedure (CAP) which is carried out by the university in the month of June.

faqs.answer: The NMU Jalgoan BTech fee ranges between INR 1.6 lakh and INR 4.4 lakh. This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. Candidates are required to pay fee after the completion of the selection process to confirm their seat in the university. The duration of the course is for four years. Candidates also need to pay tuition fee semester or annually. Besides, candidates are also required to pay an application fee in the start to register for a course.
faqs.question: Q: What is the fees for the BTech course at NMU?

faqs.answer: For admission to a BSc course of North Maharashtra University, aspirants must meet the course-specific eligibility criteria. The aspirants who are Class 12 or equivalent pass with a minimum of 50% aggregate (45% for reserved category) from a recognised board are eligible. Addition, for some specialisations, a certain percentage in some subjects can be required. The aspirants must hold the relevant documents as well for verification purposes.

The fee structure at NMU is bifurcated into various components, namely tuition, security deposit, and hostel fee. Certain fee elements are one-time payments to be made at the time of NMU admission, whereas others are recurring as per the norms of the institution fee policy. The fees vary anywhere between INR 500 - 1,85,455 depending upon the course chosen. Below is a table comprising the fee structure for different programs available at NMU.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee for MCA at NMU Jalgaon?
overview_faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for NMU Jalgaon MCA ranges between INR 46,800 and INR 1.1 lakh. This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. Besides, aspirants also need to pay other fee components such as one-time fee, hostel deposits, etc. Candidates also need to pay an application fee to register for a course in the start.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fees for the BTech course at NMU?
overview_faqs.answer: The NMU Jalgoan BTech fee ranges between INR 1.6 lakh and INR 4.4 lakh. This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. Candidates are required to pay fee after the completion of the selection process to confirm their seat in the university. The duration of the course is for four years. Candidates also need to pay tuition fee semester or annually. Besides, candidates are also required to pay an application fee in the start to register for a course.

overview_faqs.question: What is the application fee for B.Sc at NMU Jalgaon?
overview_faqs.answer: Candidates have to pay the NMU BSc application fee in order to submit their admission form. The applicants must keep the fee payment receipt safe for future references. There is no application fee detail currently available. However, students can contact the admission office to gather more details. After final selection, students have to pay the NMU Jalgaon BSc admission fee amount. The total tuition fee for the UG course range from INR 1 Lacs to INR 1.3 lakh. This fee is as per the official website/sanctioning body. It is still subject to changes and hence, is indicative.

review_summary.college_name: North Maharashtra University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Data Science Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Decent campus, average placements.

content.Placements: I belong to the 2026 passing-out batch from B.Tech Data Science. Around 60 percent of students get placed. The highest package is about 8 LPA, the lowest is 3 LPA, and the average is 4 LPA. Companies like TCS, Infosys, and Wipro hire students. Many students also do internships in good startups.
content.Infrastructure: Our Data Science department has spacious classrooms, decent labs, Wi-Fi, and a library with good books. Hostel rooms are clean, mess food is average, and the canteen has snacks. Medical facilities are basic, and sports options like cricket, football, and indoor games are available.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Instrumentation Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with my faculty and good placement in 2015. It has good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: In my course, 20% to 30% of students are placed. The highest package offered in my course is up to 7 to 8 LPA, and the lowest and average package offers in my course are up to 3 to 5 LPA. Top recruiting companies for our course are Lonex, Jonshan, and Nirma. 20% to 30% of students got internships from our course. The top role offered in my course is IONEX.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure, such as a lab, Wi-Fi, classrooms, and a library, are available for our course. The quality of the facilities in my hostel is average, and the food quality in the mess and canteen is also average. Medical facilities are not proper. Sports and games are better.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It's a good engineering college, and we are satisfied with faculty and all.

content.Placements: The college offers the best placement facilities. Around 80 percent of students get placed. Top recruiting companies like TCS and Infosys visit the college. Most students get placed in these companies. There are selection exams conducted by top recruiters. Many students also get internships in Pune- and Mumbai-based IT companies.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, libraries, and a canteen. The hostel is of good quality, and the canteen and sports facilities are good. The mess and canteen maintain hygienic conditions and have very good infrastructure.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I'm at least motivated to get my degree done.

content.Placements: Last year, there is 0 percent placement in campus selection. The highest package up to date is 6 LPA. I wish to be in cyber security. I am learning operating systems, networking, etc. by myself, and I will get guidance on this from our counsellors for further steps.
content.Infrastructure: There are Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a central library. There is a very green, nature-friendly environment where students can study peacefully. The travel facility is provided by buses, which cost 10,000 per year, which I think is a bit costly.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good teaching staff and good placements.

content.Placements: Good placements are offered in college with good packages. Placements depend on the student's interview performance. 60-70% percent of students get placements in our field. Positions depend on student interviews, CGPA, their performance, their activities, and their projects.
content.Infrastructure: Everything is available in a good manner. All types of facilities are provided. Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library facilities are all good. Good food, canteen, and medical facilities are also available, and sports and games are good.

admission_overview.college_name: North Maharashtra University Course Admissions 2025: Dates, Eligibility, Fee, Cutoff

admission_process.title: NMU Jalgaon Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: NMU admissionsare both merit and entrance-based. It accepts scores of certain entrance exams such as MAH CET, MHT CET, JEE Main, etc.NMUoffers various courses at UG, PG, diploma and doctoral levels in multiple streams. Interested candidates can apply for their preferred course on the official website of NMU or download the form for offline submission.

NMU Jalgaon offers entrance-based admission to most of the courses. However, the common eligibility remains the same which is Class 12 for UG courses and graduation for PG programmes. Below is the eligibility and selection criteria for topNMU courses:

North Maharashtra University fee is a sum of multiple components, such as tuition fee, hostel fee, etc. Some of the fee components are charged one-time, while some have to be paid semester-wise or annually, such as tuition fees. Below is theNMU feeand average package for top courses:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

NMU seat intake varies course-wise. Candidates can get a seat in the university based on their merit or entrance exam score. The reservation of seats will be as per the government policy. Below is seat intake for popular NMU courses at university and affiliated colleges:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

North Maharashtra University admission process includes registration, selection, counselling and seat allotment. Aspirants start with registration for the preferred course. Below is step-wise admission details for NMU:
1, NMU Registration Process 2025

Aspirants meeting the eligibility criteria can apply for UG or PG courses online. Aspirants can also download the application form and submit it in the campus. Besides, aspirants applying for courses following DTE admission policy are required to apply first for the respective state-level entrance exam.
2.  Selection

The university conducts CET for admission to some of the courses such as BBA, BCA, BMS, MCA and MBA. For courses such as BTech, BPharm, etc.,MHT CETscore is accepted for admission. Other state-level entrance exams such asMHCET Law,MAH CET, etc. are accepted for admission to specific programmes.
3. Counselling and Seat Allotment

Once the selection process is over, candidates are required to participate in counselling. Candidates depending on the course they have applied for, they need to participate in entrance exam or university counselling. DTE holds the counselling process using CAP method for courses following the admission process stated by it.
Aspirants are alloted seat based on their merit. Shortlisted candidates need to pay the course fee to confirm their seat in the university.

There are more than 152 affiliated with North Maharashtra University. Candidates pursuing courses from these colleges are also awarded with a degree from NMU. Moreover, find below a list of a few affiliated colleges:
Y.K.K.S. Arts Mahila Mahavidyalaya
Advance Courses of Computer Application, Jabalpur
Ali-Allana College of Pharmacy
Amar Sanstha Sanchalit Arts College
ARA College of Pharmacy
Arts and Science College, Amalner
Check the CompleteList of NMU Affiliated College.

BTech is available in five specialisations such asPaint Technology,Chemical Engineering, etc. Candidates who have passed Class 12 with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST/ DT/ NT/ OBC/ SBC/ SEBC) can apply for NMU BTech programme. The selection process for BTech is defined by DTE, Maharashtra. Admission to BTech is based on MHT CET followed by counselling. Download:NMU BTech Brochure

faqs.question: Is BTech available at NMU Jalgaon?
faqs.answer: North Maharashtra University offers four-year BTech course spread across eight semesters. BTech is available in five specialisations such as:Paint TechnologyChemical EngineeringOil, Fat and Waxe TechnologyFood TechnologyPolymer and Plastic Technology

faqs.question: What is the fees for the BTech course at NMU?
faqs.answer: The NMU Jalgoan BTech fee ranges betweenINR 1.6 lakhandINR 4.4 lakh.This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. Candidates are required to pay fee after the completion of the selection process to confirm their seat in the university.The duration of the course is for four years. Candidates also need to pay tuition fee semester or annually. Besides, candidates are also required to pay an application fee in the start to register for a course.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for BTech at North Maharashtra University?
faqs.answer: Candidates who have passed Class 12 with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST/ DT/ NT/ OBC/ SBC/ SEBC) can apply for NMU BTech programme. Aspirants must hold the documents proving their eligibility for verification at the time of admission. Besides, candidates must also pass MHT CET or JEE Main for admission to BTech course.
