courses_data.description: NMU Jalgaon offers a two-year MCA programme divided into four semesters. The university offers MCA through the Department of Computer Application, School of Computer Sciences at the PG level. Aspirants need to complete graduation to apply for MCA programme. The selection for MCA is based on MAH MCA CET scores.

faqs.question: How can I get admission in MCA at North Maharashtra University?
faqs.answer: North Mahrashtra University admission to MCA course is based on MAH MCA CET scores. Candidates scoring equal or above the MAH MCA CET cutoff get a seat in the university. Besides, aspirants must also score at least 50% aggregate in graduation for MCA admission.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for admission to MCA at NMU Jalgaon?
faqs.answer: Candidates need to pass a bachelor's degree with a minimum of 50% aggregate to apply for NMU Jalgaon MCA programme. There is a 5% relaxation in the aggregate for reserved category candidates. Aspirants appearing for the final year exam can also apply for MCA.

faqs.question: What is the fee for MCA at NMU Jalgaon?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for NMU Jalgaon MCA ranges betweenINR 46,800andINR 1.1 lakh.This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. Besides, aspirants also need to pay other fee components such as one-time fee, hostel deposits, etc. Candidates also need to pay an application fee to register for a course in the start.

courses_data.description: North Maharashtra University offers MBA for two-years. The course is spread across four semesters. Aspirants need to pass graduation with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST/ DT/ NT/ OBC/ SBC/ SEBC) to apply for NMU MBA. Admission to MBA is based onMAH CETscore. Besides, candidates can also apply with a valid score in any of the Management entrance exam.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for MBA at NMU Jalgaon?
faqs.answer: Candidates who have completed graduation with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST/ DT/ NT/ OBC/ SBC/ SEBC) can apply for North Maharashtra University MBA course. Aspirants must hold the documents proving their eligibility for verification at the time of admission. Besides, candidates must pass MAH CET to get admission in MBA. Candidates can also apply with a valid score in any of the Management entrance exam.

faqs.question: What is NMU MBA cutoff 2023?
faqs.answer: NMU offers an MBA in the full-time mode for two years. Candidates with valid MAH CET percentiles are called for the further process. As per NMU cutoff 2023, the closing percentile for MNU MBA after Round 2 stood at60.13for the General category candidates from All India Quota. In 2022, the closing percentile for MBA was91.85and in 2021, it was65.62. Also, the university offers admission to MBA course through various afiiliated colleges On analysing the cutoff, NMU has witnessed a fluctuating tren

faqs.question: Can I get a seat at North Maharashtra University with a score of 40?
faqs.answer: NMU accepts MHCET Law for admission to LLB and BA LLB. There is a low possibility of getting admission to North Maharashtra University at 40 score, as the most lenient cutoff was for BA LLB course, that closed at 40.11, for the General All India category students. Among the Home State category students, it is impossible to get admission to law courses at this score.

faqs.question: How can I get admission at North Maharashtra University?
faqs.answer: North Maharashtra University conducts CET for admission to some of the courses such as BBA, BCA, BMS, MCA and MBA. For courses such as BTech, BPharm, etc.,MHT CETscore is accepted for admission. Other state-level entrance exams such asMHCET Law,MAH CET, etc. are accepted for admission to specific programmes. Once the selection process is over, candidates are required to participate in counselling.

faqs.question: What is the minimum percentage required for NMU admission?
faqs.answer: Candidates applying for North Maharashtra University have to fulfil the eligibility criteria specified for the applied course. The eligibility criteria mentions the minimum aggregate and educational qualification. Below is NMU eligibility criteria for top courses:CourseCommon EligibilityBTechClass 12 with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST/ DT/ NT/ OBC/ SBC/ SEBC)MBAGraduation with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST/ DT/ NT/ OBC/ SBC/ SEBC)BCAClass 12MCAGraduation with a minimum of 50% aggregateMAGraduation with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST/ DT/ NT/ OBC/ SBC/ SEBC)BBAHSC

faqs.question: How can I get degree certificate from NMU Jalgaon?
faqs.answer: To obtain a degree certificate from NMU Jalgaon, candidates need to submit an application signed by them in the name of The Director Board of Examinations and Evaluation having details of student like Name, Mothers Name, Name of Examination, Month & Year of Passing, etc. Aspirants need to submit original and attested true copies of degree certificate/marks statement/passing certificate. The prescribed fees for authentication is INR 1,300 per copy.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for admission to B.Sc at NMU Jalgaon?
faqs.answer: For admission to a BSc course of North Maharashtra University, aspirants must meet the course-specific eligibility criteria. The aspirants who areClass 12or equivalent pass with a minimum of 50% aggregate (45% for reserved category) from a recognised board are eligible. Addition, for some specialisations, a certain percentage in some subjects can be required. The aspirants must hold the relevant documents as well for verification purposes.

faqs.question: What is the fees for the BTech course at NMU?
faqs.answer: The NMU Jalgoan BTech fee ranges between INR 1.6 lakh and INR 4.4 lakh . This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. Candidates are required to pay fee after the completion of the selection process to confirm their seat in the university. The duration of the course is for four years. Candidates also need to pay tuition fee semester or annually. Besides, candidates are also required to pay an application fee in the start to register for a course.

faqs.question: What is the application fee for B.Sc at NMU Jalgaon?
faqs.answer: Candidates have to pay the NMU BSc application fee in order to submit their admission form. The applicants must keep the fee payment receipt safe for future references. There is no application fee detail currently available. However, students can contact the admission office to gather more details. After final selection, students have to pay the NMU Jalgaon BSc admission fee amount. The total tuition fee for the UG course range from INR 1 Lacs to INR 1.3 lakh . This fee is as per the official website/sanctioning body. It is still subject to changes and hence, is indicative.

description: NMU Cutoff 2025 has been released for all rounds and categories for admission to MCA courses based on the MAH MCA CET exam. Students can also scroll down the page to know the cutoff of various other accepting exams. A few more exam-related updates are below:
The North Maharashtra University JEE Main cutoff 2025 was released for admission to the BE / BTech courses for multiple categories under the All India quota.

For BTech in Computer Science Engineering, the last round cutoff for the General AI category fell in the range of 111241 to 607882, wherein G H Raisoni College of Engineering and Management was the most competitive college for admission. On the other hand, the easiest college for admission was Shri Sant Gadge Baba College of Engineering an

According to the NMU BTech Cutoff 2025 for admission to the BTech CSE course for the General AI category, the hardest institute for admission was G H Raisoni College of Engineering and Management. In 2025, 2024 and 2023, the cutoffs in the last rounds were 111241, 88331 and 76930, respectively. After comparing these ranks with one another, we can conclude a declining trend in the competition for seats.

Students who want to gain admission to the BTech course have to appear in the JEE Main entrance examination. Now that admissions for the academic year 2025-26 are over. Students can refer to the table below to know the JEE Main important dates for admission in the upcoming cycle, ie, 2026-27.

Only those students who have appeared for the JEE Main entrance examination are qualified to sit for the JEE Main counselling process. Students can see the table below to either view or download the year and round-wise cutoff ranks for 2025, 2024 and 2023.

MHT CET is the entrance exam for candidates seeking admission to the BE/BTech and other courses. The cutoff was released across different categories under the Home State quota. For the General category, the NMU B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 45.83 and 82.28, with the most sought-after branch for admission being Food Technology, which had the highest cutoff percentile of 82.28. Similarly, with a lowest last-round cutoff percentile of 45.83, Food Technology became the least competitive b

NMU MHT CET cutoff 2025 was released as percentiles, which means the higher the cutoff percentile, the more competitive the course is for admission and vice versa. Considering the last round cutoff data of 2025, Food Technology turned out to be the most competitive for admission, with a cutoff closing at 82.28. For the same competitive branch, the last round cutoff was 78.2 in the General category under the HS quota.
Admissions at NMU for B.E. / B.Tech are done on the basis of MHT CET percentiles. For the next academic session, students can find out more about the MHT CET 2026 important dates in the table below:

Getting an idea of different years’ cutoff trends helps students prepare better for upcoming examinations. To assist with the same, the table below provides MHT CET cutoff for 2025, 2024, and 2023. Students can download the year-wise PDF for future reference.
The NMU MHCET Law cutoff 2025 was released for admission to the law courses for various categories under both the All India and Home State quotas.

For the General AI category, the last round cutoff for LLB course was 86.34. On the other hand, for the BA LLB course, the last round cutoff was 67.74. Out of these courses, LLB course was the more competitive one for admission. Students can see the table below to know the cutoff for the General AI category for the first and final rounds.

According to the last round for the General AI category, the NMU BA LLB Cutoff 2025 was 67.74. In 2024 and 2023, the cutoff for the same course was 40.11 and 104, respectively. After analysing these cutoff ranks, we can see that the competition has been fluctuating over the past 3 years.
Students can refer to the table below to know the cutoff for other courses, categories, rounds, etc., for the years 2025, 2024, 2023.

Students who want admission to the law courses at North Maharashtra University via the MH CET Law entrance examination can refer to the table below to know the important dates releated to the same. Students can also download these dates as a PDF file for later use.

Analysing the cutoff of the past years helps students better understand the cutoff trends over the years. To help with the same, students can refer to the table below to either view or download the consolidated MH CET Law counselling cutoff for various rounds for the years 2025, 2024, and 2023.

NMU MAH B.Ed CET Cutoff 2025 was released for admission to the BEd course for various categories under the All India and Home State quota. The cutoff was released in the form of closing and opening scores for multiple rounds.

For the General AI category, the last round cutoff ranks ranged between 6.89 and 71.25, wherein Late DCBEDT's Biyani College of Education was the toughest one for admission, followed by , with the last round ranks being

In this section, students can see the NMU BEd cutoff 2025 for multiple categories, rounds, and quotas. Students can also see the cutoff data for 2024 and 2023. For the OBC category under the Home State quota, the last round cutoff ranks ranged from 0.93 to 60.3. Among all the colleges, the one that was the most competitive college for admission was College of Education, Dhule. On the other hand, the easiest institute for admission to the BEd programme for the aforementioned category was Aspmd's

Students who want admission to this university for its BEd programme have to appear in the MAH BEd CET entrance examination to be qualified for admission. Students can see the table below to know some of the important dates related to the same.

Only those students who appeared in the MAH BEd CET entrance exam are eligible to appear in the MAH B.Ed CET counselling process. Students can refer to the table below to either view or download the round and year-wise consolidated PDF cutoff list for 2025 and 2024.

The NMU MAH MBA CET cutoff 2025 is provided in the table below for MBA/PGDM admission, among other courses. The cutoff was released across different categories. For the General AI category, the last-round cutoff percentile for MBA admission was 35.63. For the same course, the cutoff stood at 58.81 in the first round. More details are given below:

Candidates can refer to the table below to view and compare the last three years of MAH MBA CET cutoff data for admission to the MBA course. In 2025, the last round cutoff for MBA admission at NMU was 35.63. For the same course, the last round cutoff was 52.85 in 2024, while in 2023, the cutoff was concluded at 60.13.
Analysing the past three years' cutoff, it is evident that the cutoff ranks saw a dip over the years for MBA admission.

Maharashtra Common Entrance Test (MAH CET) is a state level management entrance test for admission to MBA/MMS courses. The MAH MBA CET 2025 cutoff has been released for all rounds and categories. Students can view other important dates for MAH MBA CET 2026 in the table below:

Analysing MAH MBA CET cutoff trends provides invaluable insights to students into how admission dynamics and competitiveness for different courses change over time. Students can download year-wise cutoff lists from the table given below to have a better idea of the cutoff percentile changes over the years.

NMU MAH MCA CET Cutoff 2025 has been released for all rounds and categories for students belonging to the All India and Home State quota. According to the MAH MCA CET Cutoff 2025, the cutoff for MCA course admission ranged from 82.83 to 77.83 for the candidates belonging to the General AI category.
For the General HS category, the cutoff range was 89.13 to 89.2. To know more cutoff information about other categories, rounds, and quotas, see the table below:

As per the MCA Cutoff 2025 for the General category candidates under the Home State quota, the cutoff in the last round of admission was 77.83, whereas, in 2024, admissions were closed at a percentile of 60.95, and in 2023, the last round cutoff was 73.75. This pattern over the years suggests that the competition for MCA admission is fluctuating over the past 3 years. Students can refer to the table below to know more about other categories and quotas, and rounds year-wise cutoff of 2025, 2024,
Students aiming for admission to NMU via the MAH MCA CET for the next academic year can refer to the table below to know the important dates for the MAH MCA CET 2026.

Students who want to gain a seat at NMU for the MCA course should know the cutoff trends over the years to better understand what percentiles are required for admissions. To help with the same, the table below contains the consolidated year-wise PDFs for 2025, 2024, and 2023.

According to the last round of M.E./M.Tech cutoff 2025 for the General HS category, the top three most competitive specialisations were M.Tech. in Paint Technology, followed by M.Tech. in Food Technology, and M.Tech. in Chemical Engineering, with the cutoff being 17, 16.33 and 6, respectively.
See the table below for more such comparisons about other categories in different rounds and years.

In this section, students can view the course, round, category, and quota-wise NMU Cutoff 2025 for admission to the MEd and MPEd courses for 2025, 2024 and 2023. For the General AI category, the last round cutoff in 2025 was 72.1. In 2024, the cutoff was 16.52, meaning that the competition has increased from 2024 to 2025 for this category and course.

highlights.description: One of India’s leading institutes is NMU. It has been consistently recognised by numerous national ranking agencies. As per the NIRF 2025, the institute ranked #51-100 under State Public University category. NMU excellence in academics, distinguished professors, and well-established infrastructure is the reason for its high ranks among numerous ranking agencies. All the information around NMU rankings is covered in the following article:

rankings.highlight: 20th Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Maharashtra In 2024

nirf.description:
Based on the rankings from NIRF, NMU outperformed numerous other institutes, securing a higher position, indicating that the institute is considered to be doing better in various factors evaluated by the NIRF ranking system. In the 'State Public University' category, the institute's ranks have displayed constancy when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, NMU's rank is #51, the same as last year's rank in the 'State Public University' category by the NIRF ranking.
Discover the latest rankings and categories provided by other ranking bodies listed below.
Read less

qs_world.description:
According to the rankings from QS World University Rankings, NMU outperformed various other institutes, securing a higher position for its achievements in Teaching, Graduation Success Rates, Research, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. NMU's rankings in 'Asia' category have shown a decreasing trend as per the rankings of the previous years. In 2026, NMU fell 250 ranks to #951 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
The ranks granted to the institute in the 'Southern Asia' category have shown a decreasing trend when compared to last year's rankings. In 2026, NMU fell 90 ranks to #312 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
Check out the updated rankings and category details from different ranking bodies below.
Read less

hostel.description: There are 3 boys hostel and a computer Lab is established in hostel no.2 for facilitating the Resident students, also there are 5 Girls Hostel. There are additional 2 Rooms in Girls Hostel 4 as a Guest Room. In Girls Hostel, Single seated rooms are reserved for research students and fellows while triple seated rooms are provided to post-graduate students.

library.description: The University Library has a huge collection of books, Journals and periodicals and it participates in the INFLIBNET program. Under this program more than 4000 e-journals are accessed. Archival section is established to preserve historical documents in the form of Manuscripts, Reports, etc. in the library. The Library has a approximately 8,700 of the most prestigious, high impact research journals in the world.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by G H Raisoni Institute of Business Management, JalgaonReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Decent campus, average placements.
reviews.review_text: Our Data Science department has spacious classrooms, decent labs, Wi-Fi, and a library with good books. Hostel rooms are clean, mess food is average, and the canteen has snacks. Medical facilities are basic, and sports options like cricket, football, and indoor games are available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Government College of Engineering, JalgaonReviewed on 22 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with my faculty and good placement in 2015. It has good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure, such as a lab, Wi-Fi, classrooms, and a library, are available for our course. The quality of the facilities in my hostel is average, and the food quality in the mess and canteen is also average. Medical facilities are not proper. Sports and games are better.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Godavari College of EngineeringReviewed on 19 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It's a good engineering college, and we are satisfied with faculty and all.
reviews.review_text: The college provides facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, libraries, and a canteen. The hostel is of good quality, and the canteen and sports facilities are good. The mess and canteen maintain hygienic conditions and have very good infrastructure.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by SSBT’s College of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 17 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I'm at least motivated to get my degree done.
reviews.review_text: There are Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a central library. There is a very green, nature-friendly environment where students can study peacefully. The travel facility is provided by buses, which cost 10,000 per year, which I think is a bit costly.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by SSBT’s College of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 17 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good teaching staff and good placements.
reviews.review_text: Everything is available in a good manner. All types of facilities are provided. Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library facilities are all good. Good food, canteen, and medical facilities are also available, and sports and games are good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by SSBT’s College of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 17 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Overall a good college and placements are also good.
reviews.review_text: Campus has Wi-Fi in canteen, with affordable prices for students on various dishes. Library is best, big and all books are easily available with a variety of books. Sports are very important in any sector and here also they are given priority, like basketball, cricket, tennis, etc. Digital boards are also available in classrooms.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by G H Raisoni Institute of Business Management, JalgaonReviewed on 1 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Review of G H Raisoni Institute of Business Management, Jalgaon.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is very good, and the hostel has its own separate Wi-Fi. The classrooms are normal. Some have big screens, but normally, it's for 4th year students. The library is very good. The campus is not that big, but it has an ambulance, gym, cafeteria, etc. It is average.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by G H Raisoni Institute of Business Management, JalgaonReviewed on 1 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Review of G H Raisoni Institute of Business Management, Jalgaon.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is very good, and the hostel has its own separate Wi-Fi. The classrooms are normal. Some have big screens, but normally, it's for 4th year students. The library is very good. The campus is not that big, but it has an ambulance, gym, cafeteria, etc. It is average.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by G H Raisoni College of Engineering and ManagementReviewed on 30 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good teaching staff in ENTC, and the college is not best but better for sure.
reviews.review_text: There is a library where we can study or take books. There is also a computer lab for students so they can use it for projects. Wi-Fi is available. I have no experience with the hostel, but there is a big hostel as far as I know. There are also many competitions conducted regarding sports and cultural activities. Functions like Ganesh Chaturthi, Shiv Jayanti, dance programmes, farewells, and other events are also organized.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by G H Raisoni Institute of Business Management, JalgaonReviewed on 24 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Review of G H Raisoni Institute of Business Management, Jalgaon.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are average, and some are very good. Wi-Fi is available all around the campus and works fine. The college is improving its infrastructure day by day. We are going to get a football turf this December. The hostel is very good with 24/7 water, electricity, and rooms cleaned every day by workers. The mess is average and fine for me. We have a van ready 24/7 for medical emergencies, and sports are very popular among students, including cricket, football, volleyball, etc.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by R. C. Patel Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 18 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: A good college in this region.
reviews.review_text: In a college, a campus is good according to this particular region. Facility that this college provide are too good, like all classrooms are equipped with AC, smartboard in the boys hostel, a shared Wi-Fi for every 4 rooms, and a decent hostel, but with good facilities.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure and facilities are really good. The curriculum needs to be changed.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure of college are good. Wi-Fi is provided with good internet speed. Classrooms and labs are advanced and specific for computer department. The quality of food in mess is good and the Hostel infrastructure is better. The construction is a little bit old it can be better.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by G H Raisoni College of Engineering and ManagementReviewed on 28 Oct 2025)

Hostels are clean, secure, and comfortable with Wi-Fi and regular maintenance. Mess provides hygienic, tasty food, and the canteen offers a good variety. Medical facilities include a campus health center and ambulance service. Sports and gym facilities are well-maintained with options for both indoor and outdoor games. college_info.college_name: North Maharashtra University Scholarship Details

paragraphs: North Maharashtra University provides Central Scheme of Scholarship for college and university students. Apart from this, the university also provides various schemes and fellowships to help the students. Students can find the detailed information regarding NMU scholarships:
Central Scheme of Scholarship for College and University Students:

This scholarship is provided for financial assistance to meritorious students from poor families to meet a part of their day-to-day expenses while pursuing higher studies. Under the Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) Programme of the Government of India, theses cholarship amount are disbursed directly into the bank accounts of the beneficiaries.
SC, OBC, NT, SBC Scholarship Scheme:
This scholarship is provided to the candidate belonging to SC, OBC, NT, SBC categories as per the rules of Social Welfare Department, Government of Maharashtra.
For detailed information regarding NMU schemes and fellowship, click here.

faqs.answer: It depends on what candidates mean by an Aviation professional. By far the easier and better job is that of a pilot. If candidates are young (aged 12-18), it is recommended that they pursue a general course of study. Take as many Maths and Science courses as possible. It may appear unusual to study Geography and Geology, but candidates would want to know what they are looking at.The most common aviation degree programme is the Bachelor of Science in Aviation. This degree provides a broad understanding of the Aviation industry, covering topics such as aviation regulations, safety, management, and operations. Graduates with this degree can pursue careers as pilots, air traffic controllers, airport managers, and more.
faqs.question: Q: Which Aviation degree programme should I pursue?

faqs.answer: For joining ISRO, students have to qualify the exam which is conducted every year. The recruitment for aerospace engineer in ISRO is also through entrance test. Candidates need to score good marks in order to clear the prestigious and competitive exam and work with the ISRO. The recruitment exam for ISRO is highly competitive and they attract the best minds from the country for their aerospace engineering team. Candidates must also have relevant years of experience and demonstrate skills which are required for the job profile.
faqs.question: Q: Can I join ISRO after doing Aerospace Engineering?

faqs.answer: The BTech Aerospace Engineering syllabus includes important subjects such as Aerodynamics, which deals with the forces generated because of air passing over a vehicle; Propulsion, which gives thrust to the vehicle to travel up; and Dynamics and Control, which deals with the controlling of the vehicle in the air. Other important subjects are Flight Mechanics, Structural Mechanics, Control Systems, etc.. Other important topics include heat transfer, radar systems, fluid mechanics, computer programming, aircraft design structures, etc. BTech Aerospace Engineering lays the foundation for students for further studies in Aeronautics and Astronautics.Know more about -BTech Syllabus
faqs.question: Q: What are the important subjects taught in B.Tech Aerospace Engineering?

answer.text: BTech Aerospace Engineering course opens doors for exciting career profiles in a variety of industrial fields and work with several recruiters such as airline companies, government research organizations, multinational aircraft manufacturing companies, the Indian Air Force, aeronautical laboratories, space agencies, etc. You can also enter the civil aviation industry, information technology and consulting, and automotive industries.You can work as Aerospace Engineer, Aeronautical Engineer, Aviation Engineer, Propulsion Systems Engineer, Aerodynamics Engineer, Spacecraft Maintenance Engineer, Flight Test Engineer, etc., and many more profiles. content.Placements: In our batch of M.Teach structures and design, we are a total of 9 students and none of them are placed yet for our course. All of them got internships in various private companies. Recruiting companies are not yet visiting for the particular course.

reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was very good. Our campus was big, and there were many laboratories in every branch. The hostel was clean. The canteen and mess were good. Gym was also available. Playground was provided for sports like football, basketball, tennis and cricket.

reviews.review_heading: College life is amazing with excellent faculty and teachers.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure structure is amazing and mesmerizing, they provide facilities such as high-speed Wi-Fi and well maintained labs, a big library with all books of every stream, classrooms are also amazing the teachers teach very well as I have not opted for hostel am not much aware of hostel facilities and management .

reviews.review_heading: Our college gives good experience but unhappy with some hostel food.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is top class includes Wi-Fi, high-speed computers and license software installed in it, labs, and smart classrooms. Hostel facilities are top but the food is average. College is well known for sports and includes so many grounds. Campus is around 350 acres.

reviews.review_heading: College that offers a variety of courses.
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructure wise, it is good. We have a separate block for an aerospace department with Wi-Fi, multiple labs, etc.
The hostel I chose was away from the campus and in the city because the campus was in a remote area. The city hostel was a 14-floor apartment building given completely for the hostel, there was a gym and no sports facilities and there was a clinic nearby and there was a carrom board placed in the gym for games.

reviews.review_heading: A Great College to Start with but not to end up with. !
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are well ventilated and equipped with Technologies like Projectors and Cameras which monitors the students activities during to the class hours. Hostel facility is also great. Given that AC Rooms are not here but they're not required also. As Bengaluru Climate Condition is so happening that transforms itself regularly and keep it always soothing and relaxing for us. With a Campus of 300 acres it has all those facilities which aee available to thr IIT students whether in terms of sport...

reviews.review_heading: The campus is good, but the quality of education is bad.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi facility in the college. The classrooms are excellent. There are no required lab facilities for aerospace engineering. The pictures on websites are fake. The instruments were never serviced. I really would love to see at least one aircraft and a jet engine in such huge institute.

reviews.review_heading: It is good to spend four years of engineering at Jain University with the rules, which are good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the campus is amazing. The students of the college will love the infrastructure of Jain University, and you guys will bunk the class and be in the canteen all the time or roam the entire campus. The campus is huge, where you can enjoy four years of college life better. The classrooms are good.

Best college and also the only college offering aerospace through CET in Karnataka. Best and friendly faculty members are there. Academic curriculum and lab facilities are there. review_content.Infrastructure: In my college, there is no Wi-Fi facility but while joining they said they would provide Wi-Fi facility. Lab and library facilities are also available. They provide good food in the hostel and there is no doubt about it. We have good infrastructure for sports and games as well.

faqs.answer: Brindavan College of Engineering provides programmes including B.E. / B.Tech, After 10th Diploma, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, MCA in streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, and are excellent for students to build their careers. faqs.question: Q: Which courses does Brindavan College of Engineering offer?

faqs.answer: Brindavan College of Engineering is a well-known institution for B.E. / B.Tech, After 10th Diploma, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, MCA courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha's verified reviews, Brindavan College of Engineering has a rating of 3.65 on the basis of Shiksha-verified reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 3.83 on Campus Life, 3.06 on Placements, 3.91 on Faculty and 3.9 on Infrastructure.
faqs.question: Q: Is Brindavan College of Engineering a good college/Institute?

faqs.answer: Yes, it is worth the investment at Brindavan College of Engineering.Based on the feedback from students and alumni, here's a summary:Placement Scenario:* Average salary package offered: INR2.5 Lacs - INR5 LPA (around 80% of students were placed)* the highest salary package offered: INR5 LPA - INR8 LPA (Amazon, Flipkart, etc.)* the lowest salary package offered: INR1.5 LPA - INR3 LPA* Top recruiting companies: Amazon, Flipkart, Mahindra, TCS, Infosys, etc.* Many students also received internship offers from reputed companies.Teaching Quality:* Majority of students found teachers helpful, knowledgeable, and experienced.* Course curriculum is relevant and prepares students for industry needs.* Some students mentioned that not all teachers are equally effective.Infrastructure and Facilities:* Well-equipped computer laboratories* Good library resources* Comfortable hostel facilities (with options for single occupancy)* Clean and maintained washrooms and campus* Availability of Wi-Fi and internet services (although some students reported connectivity issues)Other Aspects:* Regular fests, events, and cultural activities* Encouragement for extracurricular activities like sports* Location near Yelahanka Railway Station and Kempe Gowda International AirportOverall, based on student and alumni reviews, it appears that B.E./B.Tech at Brindavan College of Engineering can be a worthwhile investment for those seeking a career in technology. While some areas may require improvement, the college seems to have made efforts to provide a conducive environment for students' growth and development.
faqs.question: Q: Is B.E. / B.Tech at Brindavan College of Engineering worth the investment?

While the admissions are based on the scores/rank obtained in COMEDK, the last cut offs also change a lot depending on All India quota or Home State. It also varies if the applicant is a female.

review_summary.college_name: Brindavan College of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I don't suggest anyone join this college. Everyone will get something better than this.

content.Placements: There is no placement at all. They simply say that there is 100% placement. There is no placement training, and they force us to pay placement fees. 5k is just a waste. I suggest no one join here. Better to join another college. For everything, they make us pay money.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, I never ever used it. I still don't know if there is any Wi-Fi in our college. Coming to the lab, there are no proper systems at all. Even during exam time, we need to wait for the execution until someone completes their execution. Classrooms and the library are good. There are no medical facilities. Mess and canteen food we can't eat.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I found the best college at an affordable price.

content.Placements: They provide placements in companies like Google, Amazon, and many more companies. According to the resume, they hire students from each department minimum CGPSC 7 should be there and the student must meet all the criteria which are given by the college or institute.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel facilities are good. They provide all according to our needs and pretty good rooms. They clean day by day. We have friendly staff. They are good. They focus on our hygiene and they provide more valuable food three times a day.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I am not satisfied with placements in 2024.

content.Placements: As per my knowledge, 10% of students got placed. The lowest package is 2 LPA and the highest package is 3 LPA. Companies like Just Dial, Prakaran Law Technology, High Source, Aapka Loan, etc., visit the college to hire students. In my batch, students do not get internships. Companies offer roles like sales executive, salesperson, etc.
content.Infrastructure: In my college, there is no Wi-Fi facility but while joining they said they will provide a Wi-Fi facility. It provides labs and a library facility. There is a hostel on campus and it provides good food. It has a good infrastructure for sports and games.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I am not satisfied with the placements in 2024.

content.Placements: As per my knowledge, 10% of students got placed. The lowest package is 2 LPA, and the highest package is 3 LPA. Recruiting companies are Just Dail, Prakaran Law Tech, High Source, Apka Loan, etc. In my batch, no students got internships. The companies offer roles like sales executive, salem person, etc.
content.Infrastructure: In my college, there is no Wi-Fi facility but while joining they said they would provide Wi-Fi facility. Lab and library facilities are also available. They provide good food in the hostel and there is no doubt about it. We have good infrastructure for sports and games as well.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I love Brindavan weaves.

content.Placements: Many students got placed in the college. The highest package in the college is 3 LPA. The lowest package is 1.4 LPA. Top recruiting companies in the college are Flipkart, Amazon, Tata, etc. In my course, top companies are construction teams and others.
content.Infrastructure: There are different types of labs. We have computer labs, survey labs, and mechanical labs. All labs are good. Classrooms are also good.
content.Faculty: All our teachers have good behaviour. They support anything. I am studying civil engineering 1st year. They are good at teaching and understanding. Semester exams are difficult. The internal exam is easy. The pass percentage is 100%. 40 is the pass mark. The passing mark in the internal exam is 12 out of 30 marks.

placement_data.title: Brindavan College of Engineering Placement overview
paragraphs: Brindavan College of Engineering, Bangalore placements for 2019-20 batch are still ongoing. Some of the renowned recruiters of Brindavan College of Engineering final placements 2018-19 included IBM, HP, Nokia, Infosys Limited, Siemens, Larsen & Toubro Limited, etc. A few significant highlights of Brindavan College of Engineering placements 2019-20 are listed below:
A detailed placement report of Brindavan College of Engineering along with trends and statistics is given below:

Brindavan College of Engineering, Bangalore placement witnessed a fall in the percentage of students placed in Computer Science and Engineering from 51% (2019) to 2% (2020). However, there was a rise in the percentage of students placed in Information Science and Engineering from 16% (2019) to 23% (2020). The major highlights of Brindavan College of Engineering 2019-20 placement are mentioned in the table below with a comparison to 2018-19:

Salary/Statistics (2020)

Percentage of Students Placed in Information Science and Engineering

* The placement data for Brindavan College of Engineering Placements 2020 is still being updated.

Placement Rate: The highest share of 2020 placement went to Computer Application and IT stream with 67% of students placed followed by 64% and 11% for MBA and Engineering and Architecture, respectively. Given below are the stream-wise placement trends made under the BE degree course:

Placement Rate: The highest share of 2019-20 placement went to Information Science and Engineering branch with 23% of students placed followed by 14% and 4% of students in Mechanical Engineering and Electronics and Communication Engineering branches, respectively. Peak Global Private Limited
Tech Active Solutions

Brindavan College of Engineering placement cell is known for the world-class placement opportunities it offers to the students. The placement cell advises students on career options and provides them with the latest information on industry internships and final placement opportunities. It arranges for student training and industry interaction sessions to empower them with the best skills and knowledge. The students need to qualify the placement eligibility criteria to be able to get a placement offer from one of the visiting companies which include the following:
Qualify aptitude test
Have excellent communication skills
Scored overall aggregate of 50% to 60% throughout academics
Possess sound technical knowledge in the specialised domain

Brindavan College of Engineering has a wide alumni network working across multiple sectors. Out of the vast alumni network of Brindavan College of Engineering, the domain-wise placement statistics of over 400 alumni are represented in the chart below. As per the available data, around 38% of alumni of Brindavan College of Engineering are currently associated with the Engineering sector, closely followed by 25% alumni in Information Technology. A good number of former students are also working in the domain of Education.
‘Others’ represents Operations, Quality Assurance, Programme and Project Management, Sales, Arts and Design, Consulting, Finance, Administrative, Marketing and Research.

cut_off.college_name: Brindavan College of Engineering Cutoff 2025: Check Karnataka PGCET Round Wise Cutoff Ranks

description: Brindavan College of Engineering cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to several UG & PG courses. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the course, exam, round and category-wise cutoff details. Further exam-related updates are below:

Brindavan College of Engineering Karnataka PGCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. For admission to the MBA/PGDM course, the last round cutoff rank was 17590 in the General AI category. For the HS quota, the last round cutoff for the same course stood at 24803 in the General category. Comparing both the quotas, it is clear that the cutoff rank was more competitive for admission to the General AI category students as compared to the HS quota.

hostel.description: The Institute provides two boys' hostel with 384 number of inmates and one girls' hostel with 252 number of inmates. The hostels have the following facilities: Indoor sports, Wi-Fi, Book Shelf, Cold and Hot water, TV, Library and Reading Room

library.description: The library of the Institute has a collection of 8954 volumes, 1870 titles, 63 National and 33 International journals, 21 magazines, 8 newspaper, 441 CDs and digital content. The library has been using the "EASYLIB", an integrated library management software package with all the modules for the library housekeeping operations. The library has also adopted Open Access System. It also provides Online Public Access Catalogue (OPAC) allows users to search all materials (such as books, journals, Magazines, etc.) available in the library collection.

reviews.review_heading: I don't suggest anyone join this college. Everyone will get something better than this.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, I never ever used it. I still don't know if there is any Wi-Fi in our college. Coming to the lab, there are no proper systems at all. Even during exam time, we need to wait for the execution until someone completes their execution. Classrooms and the library are good. There are no medical facilities. Mess and canteen food we can't eat.

reviews.review_heading: I found the best college at an affordable price.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facilities are good. They provide all according to our needs and pretty good rooms. They clean day by day. We have friendly staff. They are good. They focus on our hygiene and they provide more valuable food three times a day.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied with placements in 2024.
reviews.review_text: In my college, there is no Wi-Fi facility but while joining they said they will provide a Wi-Fi facility. It provides labs and a library facility. There is a hostel on campus and it provides good food. It has a good infrastructure for sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied with the placements in 2024.
reviews.review_text: In my college, there is no Wi-Fi facility but while joining they said they would provide Wi-Fi facility. Lab and library facilities are also available. They provide good food in the hostel and there is no doubt about it. We have good infrastructure for sports and games as well.

reviews.review_heading: I love Brindavan weaves.
reviews.review_text: There are different types of labs. We have computer labs, survey labs, and mechanical labs. All labs are good. Classrooms are also good.

reviews.review_heading: Not a good college for placement purposes, but only for a certificate it's good.
reviews.review_text: College hostel fee is more than PG rent, so I prefer to stay in PG. The college mess is also not good, they just loot the money. Medical even they don't have any type of first aid kit. Sports, there is some space for sports, like you can play some indoor games.

reviews.review_heading: About my college and my college life.
reviews.review_text: Our class is very big. In our class, there is a projector, 4 fans, two boards, etc. Our class is very spacious and all the students are really comfortable. There are two libraries in our block (UG library and PG library). Wi-Fi is available in our college. Our canteen food and hostel food are really good. There is a separate period for sports, and they provide football, cricket, volleyball, carrom boards, and so on.

reviews.review_heading: Moderately satisfied with the college
reviews.review_text: It has a good infrastructure from out side and the ground and first floor. But as and when we reach the higher floors the infrastructure just gets poor. Not much of medical facilities and emergency equipments available. And there's too much of unnecessary security. You need a permission letter to leave the college campus even if you don't have classes which takes around half n hour.

reviews.review_heading: Our college had excellent teachers, placements, and facilities in 2020.
reviews.review_text: Our college had all the necessary facilities and equipment. Classrooms were equipped with projectors and they were well-arranged.

reviews.review_heading: Do hardwork for place CSE and it get placed easily in bangal.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good—the hostel facility's avg. Mess food is good Canteen is good Medical facility avg. Teach Sports conduct but sometimes Need to improve in games, sports and mess food Warden changes in EV 6 months. Overall, college is good. Teachers teach well. Take admission to CSE.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good for NCC.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good facilities. The infrastructure is very good. It provides free Wi-Fi and good classrooms. It has a good library. There is a canteen. Medical facilities are available. It provides sports. NCC service is well known in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good NCC.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in our college are very good. There is a good food court and we also have a library. Good medical facilities are also provided.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure of our college is great.
reviews.review_text: It has a good and well-equipped computer laboratory in our college where we can easily learn coding and computer language, which will help us to execute the programs properly. There is a good Wi-Fi facility in our college. It has clean classrooms with comfortable benches. The hostel facility is great, which provides us with good food. The canteen is also good where we can eat our snacks. It has a good first-aid facility. It also has a huge playground where we can play our respective games.

reviews.review_heading: It is an amazing college.
reviews.review_text: We have well-equipped computers laboratories to execute and learn computers languages. We have a good Wi-Fi connection in our college. The library in our college has a wide variety of books. The quality of rooms in the hostel is the best. Washrooms are very clean and neat to use, and they are well-maintained and clean every time. There is a very good food court where we get ice cream, juice and many other things. Students can play in the playground.

reviews.review_heading: The placements are not very good, but provide good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is provided on the campus. Even the infrastructure is also good, and continuous development is also being done. Laboratories are well-equipped with their respective equipment. There are two boys hostels, and one girl hostel, and one mess is also building up for hostellers.

individual_reviews.title: Taking admission here is my worst decision.

content.Placements: Average students are placed in local companies, 1.2 LPA. There are no such placements at this college. Only 10 percent of students were placed in our college. The highest package is 12 LPA for CS, and the lowest package is 2 LPA. The average package is 3 LPA. Some students got internships from our college. Our college students need to get more internships or placements. I don't know the top roles offered in our college placements. But the college provides a 6 months mandatory internship.
content.Infrastructure: Average infrastructure and sometimes critical situations for drinking water and transport facility like public transport. Average infrastructure in bus transport leads. Classrooms are neat and clean. The library is the best place in our college. Our college needs to repair their computer lab. Our college needs to make a proper cricket ground and football ground.

admission_overview.college_name: SAM Global University Admission 2025: Eligibility, Fee, Application, Scholarships

admission_process.title: SAM Global University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: SAM Global University admission is open for all the courses. The university offers UG, PG, diploma and doctoral programmes specialised in Engineering, Commerce, Business administration and others.SAM Global Universityconducted an online mode of application. Admission to all the courses is both merit and entrance-based. Applicants looking for admission to the university can apply online through the official website of SAM Global University. To know more about the SAM Global University admission process along with course eligibility and selection criteria go through the below segments:

SAM Global University offers entrance and merit-based admission to all its courses. Admission to all UG, PG, diploma and PhD courses is open. Candidates who meet the minimum eligibility criteria for the respective course must appear for the entrance exam for admission to BTech, MTech, MBA, BAMS and other courses. The table below lists SAM Global University courses eligibility along with their accepted entrance exams, & selection process:
BTech with 60% aggregate (55% aggregate for reserved category)
MAT,CAT,XAT, GMAT
Class 10 and Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry, and Biology/Mathematics as core subjects with 50% aggregate from a recognised board
Check here for detailed eligibility criteria for moreSAM Global University courses

SAM Global University admission process includes registration, online application online counselling and reporting admission confirmation. Candidates must follow the below steps to get a seat at SAM Global University:
STEP 1: SAM Global University Pune Application Process 2025
Candidates are required to apply online on the official website of the college. Candidates need to pay an application fee to complete the application procedure.
STEP 2: Selection Rounds

SAM Global University Pune shortlists candidates based on national-level entrance exams such as JEE Main/GATE/MAT and CAT as per respective courses. The college will display a provisional merit list. Candidates will be called for online counselling (merit-based seat allotment) and reporting. Further, for some courses university offers direct admission based on the last-qualifying exam score.
STEP 3: Merit List andAdmission Confirmation
Once selection rounds are over, the college releases a merit list. To allow and confirm the seat candidates are required to pay theSAM Global University course fee.

courses_data.description: SAM Global University BTech admissionis open. The institute offers a 4-year degree inBTech. Candidates seeking admission to BTech must check out the minimum eligibility requirements set by the university and have a valid score in the JEE exam. The university offers various specialisations under BTech, such as BTech in Civil Engineering, MTech in Mechanical Engineering,BTech in Electrical and Electronic Engineeringand others. Some of the important highlights related to SAM Global University BTech admission are given below:

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission to BTech at SAM Global University?
faqs.answer: No, SAM Global University offers entrance-based admission to BTech. Candidates are required to apply and appear for the JEE exam accepted by the university. After filling out the eligibility criteria candidates are required to apply on the official website of the university. After all the procedures the university releases its merit list. If the candidates are shortlisted on merit they are required to pay the admission fee to lock their final seats.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for BTech course at SAM Global University?
faqs.answer: In order to get admission to BTech at SAM Global University, students need to fulfil minimum eligibility criteria, i.e., to pass Class 12 with 45% to 60% aggregate. The university offers BTech courses in various specialisations such asCivil Engineering, Electrical Engineering,Mechanical Engineeringetc. Students who do not meet the above-mentioned educational qualification are not eligible for BTech admission at SAM Global University.

faqs.question: How much is the BTech course fee at SAM Global University?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for SAM Global University BTech course ranges between INR 1.4 lakh-INR 2.4 lakh. The total course fee may include other fee components as well. Candidates can visit the university website or get in touch with the officials for details about the fee structure. This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

hostel_campus.college_name: SAM Global University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Taking admission here is my worst decision.
reviews.review_text: Average infrastructure and sometimes critical situations for drinking water and transport facility like public transport. Average infrastructure in bus transport leads. Classrooms are neat and clean. The library is the best place in our college. Our college needs to repair their computer lab. Our college needs to make a proper cricket ground and football ground.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it was a nice experience, and the placements depend on your hard work, not on the college.
reviews.review_text: We have an environmentally friendly infrastructure with a large campus that includes a library with many books from all streams, and also well-organized labs for students of Computer Science. We also have two canteens with a menu of all items present at affordable rates, since AI-enabled Campus Wi-Fi is everywhere.

reviews.review_heading: This is one of the best colleges in Bhopal in the field of agriculture.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities, such as Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and the library, are better. The quality of food available in my college mess and canteen is too good to eat, and there's no problem with that. Medical facilities are also better, but the sports campus is not too big. So, that's the only problem.

reviews.review_heading: SAM Ayurved College, Bhopal.
reviews.review_text: Many facilities are available. Bed, almirah, fan, table, chair, Wi-Fi, RO, hot water, geyser, and cold water cooler. Mess food is not so good but it can eaten. You only get vegetarian food in the mess. Medical facilities are also provided. There is a sports garden available too.

reviews.review_heading: In our college, Jio and Vi networks not working properly.
reviews.review_text: Our department has Wi-Fi but their connection speed is very slow. Classrooms are neat and clean. Library is the best place in our college. Our college needs to repair their computer lab. Our college needs to make a proper cricket ground and football ground.

reviews.review_heading: SAM Global University Bhopal review.
reviews.review_text: Here, all sports were played, and prize distribution was also done. There was a well-equipped gym. There was also a trainer to train you. There was a well-organised library with thousands of books on all courses. There was also a hostel on the other campus. The timing of college was from 9:45 AM to 4:30 PM. There were two canteens in the college and a garden to hang out with your friends and enjoy the moments.

reviews.review_heading: Teaches are helpful during my entire course.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, library, and classrooms are good and available for all the customers. Canteen is very good, and food is very hygienic and clean. Hostel is very safe and provides all the medical emergencies at prior. They take care of all the students 24X7.

reviews.review_heading: Good atmosphere amongst the peers, really good library, and every year placement drives.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms have good ventilation, natural light, and the college has a good Wi-Fi connection. The library is the best place as it is huge. The hostels are good with nice rooms and fresh meals provided 3 times a day, and tiffin service is also provided.

reviews.review_heading: SAM College of ayurvedic science and hospital.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure includes the main college building and a 100-bed hospital attached to it. Classrooms are digitalised with projectors and smart boards. Campus also has a central library where there are many books with different authors. There are hostel facilities provided at this college. The food quality is a bit low. I suggest to avoid taking hostel beacuse rooms have decent amenities like cooler and attached toilets and bathrooms. Gym is available on campus and after 5:00 PM it is closed.

reviews.review_heading: SAM Ayurved College of Bhopal.
reviews.review_text: Every facility is provided in the hostel like Wi-Fi, furniture, a library, hot water, RO water for drinking, and much more. The hostel fee is Rs. 6,000 per person. There are 3 persons in a single room. However, 2 bedrooms are also provided. Its charge is Rs. 7,500 per person.

reviews.review_heading: Sardar Ajit Singh Smriti Ayurved Mahavidyalay Bhopal.
reviews.review_text: The department is very developed. All the facilities are available, such as Wi-Fi, a central library, water coolers, water filters, and much more. The hostel is also very nice. It is fully furnished with Wi-Fi, water filters, water coolers, geysers, solar water heaters, and power backup. The food quality is quite good.

reviews.review_heading: SAM Ayurved College Bhopal.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very good, well-developed, and furnished with all the facilities like Wi-Fi, central library, water coolers, water filters, and much more. The hostel is very nice, hygienic, and very clean. The mess is also very good, proper 2 times lunch and dinner are provided also breakfast and supper are also provided.

reviews.review_heading: Good place in 2024, really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is very good, also every facility comes with the hostel or activities appear every Saturday. Some difficulties come, but we really need to understand and learn the courses. Actually, it's better because no one provides a course under 70k, it's good.

reviews.review_heading: Facilities and placements of the college are satisfactory.
reviews.review_text: Sam Global University has a good infrastructure for the MBA course. College classrooms are big and air-conditioned. Labs are having proper facilities for the students. Library, Wi-Fi, and canteen are also available there on the college campus. Sports and other extracurricular activities are conducted for the students.

reviews.review_heading: Sardar Ajit Singh Smriti Ayurved Mahavidyalay Bhopal.
reviews.review_text: The hostel building is very good. All facilities are available. The hostel is very secured. Wi-Fi service is available on each floor. The water cooler with RO is provided. A hot water system is also provided in each room.

highlights.summary:
WBJEE 2026 registration has begun for Government College of Engineering and Leather Technology - GCELT admission to the BE/BTech course. Students can register till Apr 5, 2026, for the exam scheduled for May 24, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Government College of Engineering and Leather Technology - GCELT provides Full Time programs at the UG and PG levels. These courses are available in stream like Engineering, and have a fee structure of around INR 36,000 to 1,10,650. UG programs include B.E. / B.Tech. Further, the PG programs include M.E./M.Tech.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of placement cell.

review_content.Placements: Due to the recession this year, the placement record is too bad, and many of our seniors want to pursue higher studies. But I know the placement records of 2023. The low number of students in our college is the primary reason for the low placement reports. 42% were placed that year. The highest package offered that year was around 14 LPA, and the average package was 5.7 LPA. The recruiting companies are TCS, Capgemini, Infosys, and many leather companies. For CS and IT, SDE roles were offered. I'm not aware of which roles were offered by the leather companies.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: GCELT through my eyes - 2022 to 2026.

review_content.Placements: In our college, the placement scenario is a little bit low as more numbers of students prepare for the GATE examination. In 2023, 42% of students were placed. The highest package was 14 LPA, and the average is 6 LPA. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Deloitte, Hexaware, Infosys, Oracle, etc. For more information, you can visit the LinkedIn profile of our college - GCELT.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. There are enough labs and classrooms in our college. In the library, there are enough books but a little older version. Faculty members are too helpful. They will teach you, guide you, and grow your interest in the teaching field. As I am a day-scholar, I have no information about the hostel.

review_summary.college_name: Government College of Engineering and Leather Technology - GCELT Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 0
individual_reviews.title: Fully satisfied with the infrastructure, placement opportunities, .

content.Placements: Placement is exceptionally good. Pre-placement offers are quite common in the third year itself, but placements in the fourth year also take place. Many students pursue M.Tech through the GATE examination in various institutions like IITs, NITs, and IISERs. Big recruiting companies like Microsoft, Wipro, Cognizant, Adobe, Uber, Zomato, Infosys, Capgemini, Tech Mahindra, IBM, and Oracle come to our campus for placements. Approximately 70% of the students get placed by the end of the fourth and final year. The highest package offered is around 9 LPA, and the lowest was around 3 LPA (most recent). The average package is somewhere around 5.5 LPA. I am from the Information Technology department, and nearly 75% of the students got internships from my course in companies like TCS, Wipro, Cognizant, etc. Top roles offered in my course include software developer, web developer, database administrator, project manager, etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with the good placements, internship opportunities, and good faculty.

content.Placements: As our college is a Tier 3 college, it does not provide a good placement offer to the students. 30–40% of students are placed by on-campus placement. The highest package and the lowest package of our college are, respectively, 100000/annum and 30000/annum. The average package is 70,000/annum. Mainly Kolkata-based companies are visited in our college. In the case of internships, a smaller number of students get internship opportunities.
content.Infrastructure: As our college is not so moderate, here Wi-Fi is not available. Our lab teachers are good but the machines or chemicals in our lab are very old. We have a neat and clean classroom. But no digital facility is available. We have a big library in our college where a lot of books are available. I am not staying in hostel so I can't say anything about it. Sports competitions are also arranged by our college seniors.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of placement cell.

content.Placements: Due to the recession this year, the placement record is too bad, and many of our seniors want to pursue higher studies. But I know the placement records of 2023. The low number of students in our college is the primary reason for the low placement reports. 42% were placed that year. The highest package offered that year was around 14 LPA, and the average package was 5.7 LPA. The recruiting companies are TCS, Capgemini, Infosys, and many leather companies. For CS and IT, SDE roles were offered. I'm not aware of which roles were offered by the leather companies.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: GCELT through my eyes - 2022 to 2026.

content.Placements: In our college, the placement scenario is a little bit low as more numbers of students prepare for the GATE examination. In 2023, 42% of students were placed. The highest package was 14 LPA, and the average is 6 LPA. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Deloitte, Hexaware, Infosys, Oracle, etc. For more information, you can visit the LinkedIn profile of our college - GCELT.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. There are enough labs and classrooms in our college. In the library, there are enough books but a little older version. Faculty members are too helpful. They will teach you, guide you, and grow your interest in the teaching field. As I am a day-scholar, I have no information about the hostel.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The college is so good to get admitted for any of the courses provided.

content.Placements: Placement in this college is really good; 90% of students got placed in B.Tech in the year 2023, which is a positive review about the college. The highest package was 10 LPA, and the lowest was 3 LPA, offered by our college for the students. Cognizant, Wipro, Infosys, Capgemini, Tech Mahindra, and IBM are the top recruiting companies for B.Tech. Overall, 75% of students got internships from the course in various companies like TCS, Wipro, Cognizant, etc. Top roles offered in B.Tech include software engineer, software developer, web developer, system analysis, etc.

reviews.review_heading: It has nice environment for study, hustle friendly seniors, and great teachers. Join for GATE exam.

highlights.summary:
IMU Chennai admission 2025 is open. Interested candidates can apply directly through the official website.

A few more updates are given below:

table.details: Ministry of Shipping, Government of India

college_info.intro:
Indian Maritime University Chennai comprises of 4 schools of study, including Marine Engineering & Technology, Naval Architecture & Ocean Engineering, Nautical Science, and Maritime Management. The university offers UG, PG, and PhD programmes across Engineering, Management, Science, and other. BTech and MBA are the flagship courses offered at the university.
IMU Chennai offers a full-time, four-year BTech programme in Marine Engineering. The programme is designed with the International Convention on Standards of Training, Certification and Watchkeeping (STCW) for seafarers. After pursuing BTech in Marine Engineering, students have the opportunity to work on Indian/foreign-going ships as a Marine Engineer. The MBA programme in International Transportation by the Maritime University Chennai is a two-year programme. MBA students can seek higher education and work in Logistics Operations, Port Management, International Trade, and others.
Below-mentioned are the Indian Maritime University Chennai's popular programmes:

Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved

faqs.answer: A:    According to the reviews of the students and alumni of BBA graduates from IMU Chennai, there are several companies that place BBA in Logistics, Retailing and E-Commerce. The names of the companies are- Capgemini, Cogoport, CMA with CGM, Maersk Line, MSC, Suumaya Trans Logistics Limited, Kuehne+Nagel, etc.

But the most expensive package that has been offered recently has been about 6 Lacs per annum (LPA). The largest shipment that a reputable transportation business offered an IMUC graduate in 2023 was 6 LPA. This represents a substantial rise above the highest package of 5 LPA from the prior year. But generally speaking, IMU Chennai's placement record is regarded as marginally superior to IMU Navi Mumbai's. This is caused by various factors, such as: Compared to IMU Navi Mumbai, IMU Chennai is more established and has a better reputation. Recruiters can more easily access IMU Chennai's graduates due to its more central location. Current students may find it easier to acquire employment thanks to the wider
faqs.question: Does IMU Chennai offer better placements than IMU Navi Mumbai?

faqs.answer: A:    Regarded as one of the most prestigious institutions for maritime education and training is the Indian Maritime University (IMU). Because of its excellent academic reputation and hands-on training, the marine industry is very interested in hiring its graduates. Surpassing 90% of its graduates are placed annually, demonstrating the university's strong placement record. Among the shipping companies are Anglo Eastern, BW Offshore, NYK Line, Maersk Line, Mol Maritime India Pvt Ltd, MOL Tankers

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Indian Maritime University Chennai offers undergraduate, postgraduate, diploma, and Phd courses across various streams such as Engineering, Management, Science, and others. At the UG level, the university offers BSc, BBA, and BTech programmes. At the PG level, the univeristy offers an MBA programme to the students. faqs.answer: A:    Yes, the counselling fee is refundable for the BSc course at the IMU Chennai campus. Candidates whose names have not been published in any of IMU's admission lists will be entitled to a refund after the deducting of 10% of the counselling fee. The amount will be refunded to the account from which the payment is made.
faqs.question: Is counselling fee refundable for BSc course at IMU Campus?

faqs.answer: A:    Admission to the MBA programme at Indian Maritime University (IMUC) is based on the results of a number of entrance exams. The management skills and endurance of applicants to withstand the demands of the MBA programme are evaluated by these tests. The IMUC accepts test results from the TANCET, CAT, MAT, CMAT, and CUET PG exams. The results of other pertinent entrance tests, such as the GMAT (Graduate Management Admission Test) and ATMA (AIMS Test for Management Admissions), may also be taken into account by IMUC in addition to these. Every year there may be changes to the weighting pattern and specific requirements for admission, so before applying, make sure you are aware of the most recent information.
faqs.question: Which entrance exam scores does IMUC accept for admission to MBA?

faqs.answer: In order to pursue a profession in the maritime industry, students should choose IMUC. Modern facilities, good placement record, and great academic reputation are all attributes of the university. Programs in marine studies, including marine engineering, nautical science, and maritime administration, are widely available at the undergraduate and graduate levels through IMUC. The programme is applicable to the maritime sector, and the instructors are knowledgeable and competent. Through internships and apprenticeships, students at IMUC can obtain practical experience in the workplace thanks to its numerous ties with maritime companies. Students at IMUC have a very good placement history. Leading marine enterprises worldwide place a large number of pupils in well-paying positions.

To get a seat in this programme, canddiates must complete their Class 12 from the PCM stream with at least an aggregate of 60% and 50% in English at the Class 10 & 12 levels. Additionally, for the selection process, the university accepts the IMU CET exam.

course_faqs.question: Does IMU Chennai offers scholarships to BSc students?
course_faqs.answer: Yes, IMU Chennai does offer scholarships to BSc students on various grounds, such as academic merit, to the meritorious students with the aim of motivating them to keep achieving remarkably every semester. The scheme is based on the academic performance of the students in their immediate previous semester examination. Moreover, the campus also offers scholarships to women cadets, economically weak students, and state/ government aided scholarships.

course_faqs.question: Does IMU Chennai offers any female scholarships to BSc students?
course_faqs.answer: Yes, IMU Chennai does offer female scholarships to BSc students. Basically, In order to encourage and motivate girl cadets to join the maritime career, deserving girl students are being given scholarships by the industry. fee concession for girl students is under consideration by the Government of India.

overview_faqs.question: Is IMUC a good option?
overview_faqs.answer: In order to pursue a profession in the maritime industry, students should choose IMUC. Modern facilities, good placement record, and great academic reputation are all attributes of the university. Programs in marine studies, including marine engineering, nautical science, and maritime administration, are widely available at the undergraduate and graduate levels through IMUC. The programme is applicable to the maritime sector, and the instructors are knowledgeable and competent. Through internships and apprenticeships, students at IMUC can obtain practical experience in the workplace thanks to its numerous ties with maritime companies. Students at IMUC have a very good placement history. Leading marine enterprises worldwide place a large number of pupils in well-paying positions.

overview_faqs.question: Is counselling fee refundable for BSc course at IMU Campus?
