overview_faqs.question: Is IMUC good for MBA?
overview_faqs.answer: Absolutely, students who want to pursue an MBA should choose IMUC. The university provides a top-notch MBA program with a maritime sector concentration. Business strategy, marketing, finance, operations management, marine law, and maritime logistics are just a few of the many topics covered in the MBA program. In order to get practical experience in the maritime sector, students can also take part in case studies and internships. The placement record of MBA graduates from IMUC is outstanding. Numerous graduates are hired by top marine organizations worldwide for well-paying positions.With a quality program, a solid placement record, and an emphasis on the marine industry, IMUC is a great choice for students interested in an MBA in maritime studies.

review_summary.college_name: IMU Chennai Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Nautical Science (DNS) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: HIMT excels in training.

content.Placements: I am part of the DNS Batch of 2025-2026. We are placed in the Mediterranean Shipping Company. Our batch is 100% placed in the course. The highest package offered is $370 per month for the position of deck cadets upon joining the job.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure during the course are phenomenal, with Wi-Fi. Classrooms, and labs equipped with the latest technology. Food quality is great. Hostel, canteen, medical, and sports facilities are very good.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Nautical Science (DNS) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely worthy to join HIMT. HIMT teaches us to tackle loneliness, homesickness, and challenges.

content.Placements: The placement record of our batch is 100 percent. We were placed by M.Sc. before joining HIMT itself. Top recruiting companies for DNS are IMEC, Synergy, BSM, etc. No internship is required, and it will be provided during this course, and the one job we all will get will be as a deck cadet on a merchant vessel.
content.Infrastructure: In our whole campus, accommodation is provided, an academic block, a galley (mess room), turf for playing football, cricket, basketball, a ground for volleyball, a library, and each class has a maximum space of 40 students, with smart board facility as well as AC provided there.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Nautical Science (DNS) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Excellent facilities and instructors.

content.Placements: I am pursuing a Diploma in Nautical Science (DNS). Our batch has 40 students, and all have sponsored by the Mediterranean shipping company (M.Sc). We are completing the course in December 2025 and joining as deck cadets in the upcoming months. HIMT has a very good placement record. Companies like BSM, M.Sc, Synergy, Zodiac, MOL, and PIL regularly visit the campus.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is the best in HIMT. It includes all the required departments, like we have a VR lab, library, seamanship lab, workshop, turf for playing cricket, football, pickleball, badminton, and basketball. The quality of food is good, and the hostel has very good infrastructure, and there is an indoor sports room on each floor of the E block.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Nautical Science (DNS) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Asia's top maritime college.

content.Placements: About my course, it's a one year course in which we complete our pre-sea training in college and 18 months on-board ship. Also, in our batch, all got placed in the world's largest shipping company, M.Sc. And many companies are visiting and giving more placement opportunities to our college students.
content.Infrastructure: About infrastructure, it was very spacious and green campus. Everything that we had, like a hostel room, swimming, computer lab, Seamen ship lab, was built with world-class technology, and they have a VR simulator which made us learn with real-life situations.

individual_reviews.course: Graduate Marine Engineering (GME) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: GME course from HIMT is a pathway to a successful career.

content.Placements: About 80% of students are placed in various shipping companies like MMSI, M.Sc., BSM, Damico, and Zodiac, all selected as TME. At HIMT, if you have good academics and speak well, getting a placement is not difficult. Focus on the basics and have good communication skills. That is the shortcut for placement.
content.Infrastructure: In the hostel, you get a sharing room space. You get your own bed, cot, pillow, and all covers, one study table and chair each, and one cupboard space. You also get all toiletries, uniforms, and books on campus. The fees are inclusive of all this. Mess is also provided, where you get meals three times a day and coffee and tea twice a day.

admission_overview.college_name: IMU Chennai Admission: Eligibility, Application, Process, & Last Dates

admission_process.title: IMU Chennai Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Interested students can check out the IMA course-wise eligibility for admissions below:
The IMA Admission Process has been highlighted below:
1: Application Process 2025

The admission process at IMA starts with the application process. Interested students must visit the IMU official website to register online. The application form can be obtained from the official website. Candidates must pay the application and entrance test fee online. Candidates must attach the payment receipt along with the application form. The completed application form must be submitted online with necessary documents and payment proof.
2: Selection Rounds

Admission to IMA is offered based on valid scores of accepted entrance exams. For primary selection, candidates must pass with a minimum aggregate of 60% in PCM. Candidates must have valid scores in accepted entrance exams such as IMU CET, TNEA, JEE Main. For ME/MTech, a BTech degree with 55% marks and qualification through CEETA is required. For BBA, Class 12 with 50% marks and qualification through IMU CET is required. For MBA/PGDM, a graduation degree with 50% marks and qualification through TANCET or IMU CET is needed. For UG Diploma, Class 12 with 60% marks and qualification through IMU CET is required.
3: Merit List Release & Counselling

After the completion of all the selection rounds, candidates must appear for the counselling process for the respective courses. The university will release the merit list in various rounds of the selected candidates.

For MBA programmes, candidates applying on the basis of CAT/MAT/CMAT scores, and for M.Tech programmes on the basis of GATE/CUET (PG)/PGCET scores, need to register for counselling. For Ph.D., M.S (By Research), and Integrated Ph.D. programmes, a separate offline exam and interview will be conducted, details of which will be notified on the IMU website. Candidates who apply based on CUET scores for UG programmes (except BBA) need to register for spot counselling, with information to be announced after the release of the third list. Spot counselling for vacant seats and certificate verification will also be conducted as per the schedule

faqs.answer: Yes, IMU CET is compulsory to get admission into B.Tech courses at IMU Chennai. All six campuses of the Indian Maritime University (IMU) accept the scores of the IMU CET for admission to BTech. Thus, to get enrolled in this course, applicants are required to fill out the IMU CET application form and pay the application fee. Further, the university conducts a counseling process for admission confirmation.

paragraphs: IMU Chennai Indian Maritime University (IMUC) has not released its placement report for 2025. Once released it will be updated on this page. The placement rate recorded at IMUC lies between 80-90% as stated by some unofficial sources. The placement package achieved at IMUC placements is different and varies from company to company.

faqs.question: How many students were placed at IMU Chennai MBA placements?
faqs.answer: The number of students placed during IMU Chennai placements is not out yet. Once out it will be updated here. However, as per some unofficial sources IMU Chennai recorded a placement rate of 80-90% with good placement packages.

faqs.question: What are the career opportunities avaialble after completing BSc course from Indian Maritime University (Chennai Campus)?
faqs.answer: Indian Maritime University (Chennai Campus) offers a BSc course in one specialisation, i.e., Nautical Science. This course opens various career opportunities both at sea and ashore. The names of the job roles available after completing the course are as follows: Deck Cadet Navigation Officer Marine Surveyor Port Operations, etc.

faqs.question: What are the names of the recruiters who recruits BBA graduates from IMU Chennai?
faqs.answer: According to the reviews of the students and alumni of BBA graduates from IMU Chennai, there are several companies that place BBA in Logistics, Retailing and E-Commerce. The names of the companies are- Capgemini, Cogoport, CMA with CGM, Maersk Line, MSC, Suumaya Trans Logistics Limited, Kuehne+Nagel, etc.

faqs.question: What are the job opportunities available after completing BBA course from IMU Chennai?
faqs.answer: Indian Maritime University (Chennai Campus) offers a BBA course in one specialisation, i.e., Logistics, Retailing and E-Commerce. This course opens various career opportunities in business and management aspects of maritime trade, supply chain, and online commerce. The names of some of the job roles available after completing the course are as follows: Logistics Coordinator/ Executive Supply Chain Analyst E-Commerce Operations Executive Export-Import Executive Warehouse/ Inventory Manager Business Development Executive, etc.

It includes all the required departments, like we have a VR lab, library, seamanship lab, workshop, turf for playing cricket, football, pickleball, badminton, and basketball. The quality of food is good, and the hostel has very good infrastructure, and there is an indoor sports room on each floor of the E block.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Hindustan Institute of Maritime Training (HIMT)
reviews.review_heading: Asia's top maritime college.
reviews.review_text: About infrastructure, it was very spacious and green campus. Everything that we had, like a hostel room, swimming, computer lab, Seamen ship lab, was built with world-class technology, and they have a VR simulator which made us learn with real-life situations.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Hindustan Institute of Maritime Training (HIMT)
reviews.review_heading: GME course from HIMT is a pathway to a successful career.
reviews.review_text: In the hostel, you get a sharing room space. You get your own bed, cot, pillow, and all covers, one study table and chair each, and one cupboard space. You also get all toiletries, uniforms, and books on campus. The fees are inclusive of all this. Mess is also provided, where you get meals three times a day and coffee and tea twice a day.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Hindustan Institute of Maritime Training (HIMT)
reviews.review_heading: Highly recommended college for GME in India.
reviews.review_text: We have various labs like the Basic Skills Workshop, where we do hot works, welding and gas cutting, fitting, plumbing, lathe, etc. We have an Auxiliary Machines Workshop with equipment like pumps, valves, air compressors, heat exchangers, purifiers, pistons, lines, crankshafts, etc. We also have a fully equipped Electrical Lab, an operational ship on campus, and a VR lab.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Hindustan Institute of Maritime Training (HIMT)
reviews.review_heading: I get placed in MMSI through HIMT after completing GME.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are excellent. We have a world-class sports complex including a basketball court, football turf, cricket turf, pickleball courts, swimming pool, laundry service, separate hostels for boys and girls, a ship on campus, state-of-the-art virtual reality labs, and many more. The hostel can accommodate around 800 cadets.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Hindustan Institute of Maritime Training (HIMT)
reviews.review_heading: Highly recommended college for B.Tech Marine Engineering.
reviews.review_text: We have a ship on campus, where we get to see and operate all the live machinery that is available on board a ship. We also have a state-of-the-art facility, which is our virtual reality lab, where we have fully immersive ship visits. Apart from this, we have a swimming pool, sports turf and complex, air-conditioned classrooms, good hostels, etc.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Hindustan Institute of Maritime Training (HIMT)
reviews.review_heading: My success story as B.Tech Marine Engineering Cadet.
reviews.review_text: We have about 14 acres of greenery-filled campus with all the advanced facilities like dedicated hostel blocks for girls and boys, swimming pool facilities, gym, sports turf for football and cricket, virtual reality labs, smart classrooms with AC, ship in campus and many more.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Hindustan Institute of Maritime Training (HIMT)
reviews.review_heading: Do B.Tech in Marine Engineering only at HIMT College.
reviews.review_text: HIMT College is a green, lush campus. It spread across 15 acres of land with dedicated academic blocks. It also has hostel blocks, labs and workshops, a mess area that accommodates 400 at a time, an auditorium with centralized AC, a well-equipped gym, a swimming pool, and a sports complex. All facilities required for training and recreation are available within the campus.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Hindustan Institute of Maritime Training (HIMT)
reviews.review_heading: Highly recommended college for B.Tech Marine Engineering.
reviews.review_text: At HIMT College, nobody can beat the infrastructure. We have all the latest equipment and advanced technologies for maritime training. Whether it is digital innovation or physical equipment, HIMT College has it all, with smartboards and AC in all classrooms and labs.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by International Maritime InstituteReviewed on 9 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Excellent faculty, and the curriculum is career-focused for B. Tech students.
reviews.review_text: The International Management Institute (IMI) has a campus. It includes facilities such as hostels, classrooms, a mess, and a library. The campus having classrooms, a library, and other facilities. It support academic programs. Campus life at IMI includes hostel accommodation, a mess, a canteen, and facilities for sports and games.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by International Maritime InstituteReviewed on 24 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Absolutely excellent college.
reviews.review_text: IMI has a modern campus with well equipped classrooms and training labs providing advanced simulators for aviation and engine training. The institute has a library with maritime books and digital resources and hostel and mess facilities are available for students. Sports and recreational areas are also part of the campus infrastructure. IMI provides quality maritime education with modern infrastructure, including simulators, workshops, library, hostel, and sports facilities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by International Maritime InstituteReviewed on 21 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Review of Diploma in Nautical Science course at IMI.
reviews.review_text: It is a small but clean and cozy hostel with good Wi-Fi and AC. Regular cleaning takes place. The only downside is the AC. It has a clean mess with good food. The market is nearby. The nearest metro is 5 minutes away (20 minutes by walk). It has pretty decent football, volleyball, and tennis grounds.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by International Maritime InstituteReviewed on 26 Apr 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with placements, average infrastructure, and fee is a little bit high too.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are average. Classrooms and library are good. Labs are average and mess food is very good. For medical, IMI gives Tata medical card to all the cadets we can avail our medical expenses up to 4 lakhs. Game and sport facilities are average.

college_info.college_name: IMU Chennai Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Hi.The total tuition fee  of UG courses for IMU Chennai  is INR 6.8 Lakh- INR  INR 9.75 Lakh. Apart from the tuition fee, there is a one-time admission fee of amount INR 25,000 that students are required to pay in addition to the tuition fee. To get admitted to IMU Chennai B.Sc. in Nautical Science course, applicants must meet the entry requirements - 60% in 12th.
Thanks

Yes, IMU Chennai does offer scholarships to MBA students on various grounds, such as academic merit, to the meritorious students with the aim of motivating them to keep achieving remarkably every semester. The scheme is based on the academic performance of the students in their immediate previous semester examination. Moreover, the campus also offers scholarships to women cadets, economically weak students, and state/ government aided scholarships.

Yes, IMU Chennai does offer female scholarships to BBA students. Basically, In order to encourage and motivate girl cadets to join the maritime career, deserving girl students are being given scholarships by the industry. fee concession for girl students is under consideration by the Government of India.

faqs.answer: A:    Dr. D.Y. Patil School of Engineering accepts GATE and MHTCET MTech scores for admission to the M.Tech program. paragraphs: The highest package offered was INR 26 LPA and 250 companies visited the campus during DY Patil School of Engineering placements 2022. As of now, 503 students were placed in top-notch companies during placement DY Patil School of Engineering placements 2022.

faqs.question: Does Dr. D.Y. Patil School Of Engineering offer better placements than Siddhant College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: Siddhant College of Engineering : About 60% of students are placed every year. The highest salary package offered at this college is 9 LPA, the average is 5 LPA, and the lowest is 2.5 LPA. Most MNCs in India come to this campus for placements. Dr. D.Y. Patil School Of Engineering: The highest placement is about INR 12 lacs, and off campus, it's around INR 45 lacs per annum. The average placement of INR 4-5 lacs per annum is for 2023. Infrastructure: The infrastructure at DYPCOE is very good compared to all nearby colleges. Overall, Dr. D.Y. Patil School Of Engineering is better option when comparing the placements.

reviews.review_heading: The best college for extra activities and it also gives chance to represent your ideas to industry.
reviews.review_text: Good food and mess quality. Medical and sports facilities are also available. The events and all activities are taken care of by the college. Library facilities are also good in the college; all types of books are available in the library. The classroom is also good; facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: My college is fantastic in Pune.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the DY Patil school of engineering is very good in the applied sciences department. There are special labs for mechanical labs. It is the very best infrastructure. It is the best college in Pune for sports and academics. And all branches of engineering in Pune.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members of our college were not good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and environment of our campus were the best. Wi-Fi was not available for students. Library was good. Mess and canteen were good but served average quality food. Other activities were good. The environment of our college was good to study.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best colleges.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides us with all facilities. The mess and canteen facilities are available in our college. The food served in the canteen is expensive. Mostly, students go outside the campus to get meals and snacks.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Dr. D.Y. Patil School Of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a good laboratory facility. E-learning facility is also available. Hostel facilities are better. New laboratory is constructed with advanced equipment and new technologies. The food served in the canteen is decent.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, our college is good.
reviews.review_text: We have a lush green campus with Wi-Fi connectivity. There is a huge library with a huge number of books for engineering, diploma, master's, GATE, and other GK books. Hostel rooms are also good and provide laundry facilities. The hostel fee is high for middle-class families. Hostels are also divided into 3 floors.

reviews.review_heading: Placements here are fine, & teachers aren't much professionals, only a few know what they are doing.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and accommodation are fine. There are instruments and systems for practicals but some of the professors here aren't good especially 2nd-year professors. I have experienced it myself. They just showed youtube videos in the name of practicals during online classes. I cannot say anything about offline hands-on practicals because I have yet to experience them.

reviews.review_heading: Campus infrastructure was good but faculty was not good. Really dissatisfied.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure was good and the lab was also good but few instruments were not available due to the high cost. Wi-Fi was available and a stadium for playing. The hostel was also okay. The food was okay and the medical facility was average. Games are more to play. The canteen was very much impressive.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely good college. !
reviews.review_text: Our college is surrounded by mountains. Premises of college is big enough. Air is very fresh there. This right place for students who also loves nature. Labs are very well managed. Studying here is fun and I loved campus very much and you will too, if you visit it.

reviews.review_heading: There are very poor placements in my college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms and library are available in our department. I do not stay in a hostel, so I don't know about the hostel. Canteen and sports are available in our college but not allowed to play.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure of the college is good, but faculty members are very poor.
reviews.review_text: The college is only famous for its infrastructure. There is an eight-storey building. There is also a 7-storey building. One cricket ground is available in the college but is available only for namesake. Students are not allowed to play. There is no hall to conduct any events. There are many buildings available on the campus. Parking facility is good. One can't play any games on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Our college life was awesome.
reviews.review_text: DY Patil is the governor of Bihar. DY Patil has many branches. DY Patil School of Engineering Academy is one of the colleges which has an awesome campus, big stadium and sports cafe. All types of sports grounds are available. My college was an integrated campus combining engineering, polytechnic & MBA.

reviews.review_heading: A good college for automobile course. Best for economic conditions.
reviews.review_text: The college has made avail the facilities like Wi-Fi, computer labs, IV, cricket ground, and a workshop. The canteen of this campus is best of all the DY Patil Group of Colleges. The classrooms are equipped with digital learning. The hostels are available for both boys and girls. A hostel room accommodates six persons.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is moderate in every field.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi facility near the canteen. The library is big, and there are good staff members. The classrooms are clean. All the sports-related activities are good. The quality of food in the canteen is moderate. The hostel rooms are costly as compared to the other colleges. The medical facilities are available outside the college campus.

reviews.review_heading: The college is moderate, which is neither good nor bad.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure on the campus is good, but the management is bad. If you want the education with good nature, I will suggest you to DYPSOEA. The campus is spread over 50-acres, which is fully the green land. It is having cricket ground, green lawn, and everything that we want in the infrastructure of college.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Dr. D.Y. Patil School Of Engineering

likes.text: Project engineers, system engineers, production line and many students are placed in Wipro, Infosys, capjemini etc.
